image_metadata.short_caption: An 18th-century satirical engraving showcasing a bizarre hybrid figure that is half-man and half-woman, dressed in distinct period attire for each side, holding a sword and a fan respectively, accompanied by text proclaiming it an "uncommon" production.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
This is an 18th-century monochrome engraving or etching depicting a satirical, allegorical figure that is half-man and half-woman, presented in profile, facing left. The central figure is a composite being, with its body divided vertically down the middle, showcasing distinct masculine and feminine attributes on each side.

On the left, the male half is depicted in traditional 18th-century attire, including a formal coat with ruffled cuffs, breeches, and a sturdy boot on his left foot, adorned with a prominent spur. His left hand firmly grips a large, curved saber or sword with a detailed hilt, held forward and slightly downwards. The male head, also facing left, is topped with what appears to be a tricorne hat or similar period headwear, and his face features a small beauty mark or mole on the cheek.

On the right, the female half is elegantly dressed in a low-cut gown with a ruffled neckline and elaborate sleeves, and a long, full skirt adorned with ruffles along the hem. An apron with a delicate floral pattern is worn over her skirt. Her right foot is clad in a high-heeled shoe characteristic of the era. Her right hand gracefully holds an open, folding fan. The female head, also facing left, features an elaborate, towering hairstyle or wig abundantly decorated with large, voluminous feathers, reflecting the exaggerated fashion trends of the late 18th century. She also sports a beauty mark or mole on her cheek.

Both halves share a single torso, giving the impression of a unified yet bizarre individual. The figure stands on a patch of uneven ground, depicted with a textured, scribbled pattern suggesting grass or dirt. The background is plain and light, drawing full attention to the central, unique subject.

Below the illustration, in elegant calligraphic script, is a two-line inscription that reads: "Hail! Thou Production most uncommon, / Woman half-man and man half Woman!" This text directly addresses and defines the figure, highlighting its extraordinary nature and likely serving as a social commentary or satire on gender roles, evolving societal norms, or specific individuals who might have been perceived as embodying a mix of traditionally masculine and feminine traits. Below this main inscription, in smaller script, is the reference "Vid: Epiſtle.", indicating that the print might be an illustration or a direct reference to a particular published letter or satirical poem of the period.

instruction: Remove the sword, put the bust of Athena in the bowl on the right (and facing forward), and then fix the urn and bowl on the left so they are both standing upright.

image_metadata.short_caption: A meticulously detailed 19th-century still life painting by W. Harnett, dated 1878, showcasing an opulent and eclectic collection of ornate objects including weaponry, various pottery, and decorative items, all richly rendered on a green tablecloth with a dramatic interplay of light and shadow.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
This is a meticulously detailed 19th-century still life painting by William Michael Harnett, signed "W. HARNETT 1878" in the lower left corner. The composition presents an eclectic array of ornate and exotic objects arranged on a rich green tablecloth with a decorative red and pink patterned border. Some of the items are elevated on a lighter, textured, yellowish-tan surface, possibly a draped fabric or animal hide. The background transitions from a deep, dark brown on the left to a warm golden-ochre on the right, creating a dramatic contrast that highlights the intricately rendered objects.

On the far left, a large, rectangular red lacquered panel, possibly a tray or screen, is propped upright, adorned with a vibrant, sweeping depiction of a mythical bird in flight. In front of it, a dark grey or black vase, reminiscent of Wedgwood pottery, displays white classical figures in relief. Alongside it lies a terracotta-colored vessel with a gold-and-black Greek key pattern around its neck. A large, dark metallic bowl or helmet, highly embossed with intricate patterns and what appears to be Arabic script, is tilted nearby.

Towards the center, a slender, mint-green cylindrical vase with delicate white floral relief stands on a small, ornate pedestal. Behind it, a tall, multi-segmented metallic column, perhaps a telescope or ceremonial object, is vertically positioned and heavily embellished with swirling designs. A small, elegant white footed bowl with gold trim sits between these items.

A prominent element that spans the composition is a long, gleaming saber with a white, cord-wrapped hilt and an elaborate, animal-headed pommel. Its blade cuts diagonally across several objects, drawing the eye. To the right, a dark, classical helmet, likely Roman or Greek in style, is depicted. Next to it, a vibrant blue decorative plate features a central medallion with a charming bird perched on a branch, surrounded by delicate gold scrollwork. Completing the right side is a wooden candlestick with a distinctive twisted stem and a large, bulbous, three-footed grey urn adorned with painted white and blue flowers and a detailed butterfly, showcasing fine ceramic artistry.

The painting demonstrates exceptional attention to texture, from the smooth glint of metal and porcelain to the soft folds of fabric and the intricate patterns on each piece. The subtle yet dramatic lighting emphasizes the three-dimensionality of the objects, inviting the viewer to explore every exquisite detail of this rich and contemplative still life.

instruction: Change all examples of STREET to AVENUE and swap the locations of the words SQUARE and PLACE.

image_metadata.short_caption: An old, weathered street sign on a brick wall details "HEATHCOTE STREET W.C." and lists nearby destinations like Mecklenburgh Square and Guilford Street, featuring distressed white and black lettering with a pink border.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays an old, rectangular street sign mounted on a textured brick wall. The sign features a predominantly white, distressed background with black, raised lettering, and is framed by a faded pink border. The white paint shows extensive crackling and flaking, revealing wear and tear, and hints of rust stains are visible around the four screws that secure the sign to the wall. The main text at the top reads "HEATHCOTE STREET W.C.", with the "W.C." portion prominently colored in the same faded pink as the border, making it stand out. Below this, smaller black letters state "LEADING TO", followed by a list of other nearby locations: "MECKLENBURGH SQUARE", "DOUGHTY STREET", "CAROLINE PLACE AND", and "GUILFORD STREET.". A small period marks the end of the last street name. The background consists of dark, likely brown or grey, bricks with visible mortar lines, providing a sturdy, urban context for the aged sign. The lighting is even, allowing for clear readability of the text and highlighting the sign's vintage character and worn condition.

instruction: Turn this scene into a photagraph depicting the people in the room as real people and the wall hangings as paintings seen in the picture.

image_metadata.short_caption: An engraving titled "SUBSTANCE AND SHADOW." portrays a crowd of somber, working-class adults and children gazing at numerous framed paintings in an art gallery, highlighting the stark contrast between their impoverished reality ("substance") and the idealized, often opulent, world depicted in the artworks ("shadow").
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
This black and white engraving, titled "SUBSTANCE AND SHADOW.," presents a poignant social commentary within an oval-shaped composition. The scene depicts a crowded interior space, likely an art gallery or an exhibition hall, where the walls are entirely covered with framed pictures. In the foreground and middle ground, a diverse group of people, predominantly adults and numerous children, stand and observe the artworks. These figures appear to be from the lower socio-economic strata, dressed in simple, often worn clothing; men wear hats and plain coats, while women are cloaked in shawls and bonnets. Many of the children are barefoot or in simple garments, and one child in the extreme foreground sits on a low, wheeled platform, suggesting a physical disability. Their expressions are generally somber, weary, or contemplative, with many looking up at the paintings, others casting their gazes downwards, or interacting subtly amongst themselves. The flooring is depicted as simple wooden planks.

The "shadows" filling the upper and background portions of the image are the numerous framed artworks. These paintings showcase a wide range of subjects, predominantly portraits of well-dressed and stately figures, including a military official, an elegant woman with a small dog, and distinguished gentlemen. Other works include still lifes of fruit and flowers, as well as charming animal depictions like a parrot on a perch with a sleeping dog and a fish on a platter. The frames vary from simple to ornate, contributing to the sense of a grand collection. The stark visual contrast between the humble, often impoverished "substance" of the observers and the idealized, opulent, or detached "shadows" presented in the art is the central theme of the engraving, underscoring the social disparities of the era. The artist's signature, "F.C. Lee" (or similar initials), is faintly visible in the bottom left curve of the oval frame.

instruction: Add an elegant oblong silver metal spaceship floating above the water in the middle right of the painting, maintaining stylistic consistency.

image_metadata.short_caption: Claude Monet's impressionistic landscape from 1897, featuring a tranquil river enveloped by lush, misty foliage and serene reflections of a soft sky.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: This horizontal oil painting, characteristic of the Impressionist movement, depicts a serene waterway, likely a river or a pond, enveloped by dense, verdant foliage under a soft, diffused sky. The scene is rendered with a harmonious palette dominated by cool greens, blues, and grays for the lush trees and water, subtly contrasted by delicate warm pinks, purples, and whites in the sky and its luminous reflections. The upper portion of the canvas reveals glimpses of a bright, yet hazy, sky peeking through the canopy of trees, suggesting either early morning mist or a late afternoon glow. The foliage on the banks is painted with loose, expressive brushstrokes, conveying the texture and volume of the leaves without sharp definition, typical of Monet's style, where light and atmosphere take precedence over precise form. The central element is the calm body of water, which perfectly mirrors the surrounding trees and the ethereal sky above, creating a captivating play of reflections. The reflections are not perfectly precise but rather shimmering and slightly elongated, giving a dynamic quality to the still water surface. The light seems to diffuse softly throughout the entire composition, creating an atmospheric and almost dreamlike quality. In the bottom left corner, the artist's signature, "Claude Monet 97", is clearly visible in red-brown paint, indicating the work was created by the renowned French Impressionist Claude Monet in 1897. The painting evokes a profound sense of tranquility and an intimate connection with nature.

instruction: Change the icon to show a lion instead, and update the text of the sign so that it is about lions too.

image_metadata.short_caption: A white informational poster outlines key bear safety tips, including hiking in groups, making noise, carrying bear spray, and not running, all displayed over a dark grey bear silhouette.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a vertical, close-up view of a white informational sign or poster detailing bear safety tips. At the top, partially faded, the words "BEAR ATTACK:" are visible, followed by the question "Are you Prepared to Avoid One?" rendered in a lighter, less distinct grey font. The main visual element is a large, central silhouette of a bear, depicted in a dark grey halftone or distressed pattern, which extends from the mid-section of the sign down to the bottom. Superimposed over this bear silhouette and the white background are several bold, black-lettered instructions, each with a slightly textured or pixilated appearance, providing advice for avoiding bear encounters. These tips include: "HIKE IN GROUPS" (with "3 OR MORE" below it in smaller text), "BE ALERT FOR BEARS", "MAKE NOISE", "CARRY BEAR SPRAY", and "DO NOT RUN". The sign appears to be a physical print, as evidenced by the slight unevenness of the paper and the visible metal staples used to affix it; one staple is bent inwards on the top left, another partially seen on the top right with a reddish tint, and a third is visible on the left edge. The lighting is bright and even, allowing for clear readability of the text despite the textured font and the background bear image.

instruction: Move the male lion on the middle platform to the empty platform and change the other lion into a tiger.

image_metadata.short_caption: Two majestic lions are captured in a peaceful outdoor setting, comfortably resting on elevated wooden platforms within their enclosure.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents an outdoor scene within what appears to be a large animal enclosure, likely a zoo or wildlife park, featuring two majestic lions resting on specially constructed wooden platforms. The viewpoint is elevated, looking down upon the sandy and grassy ground, which is sparsely covered with green patches and scattered dry leaves, typical of a natural habitat. To the left, a lioness is seen fully stretched out on a long, wide wooden platform that slopes gently downwards, supported by robust wooden posts. Her body is relaxed, with her head facing away from the viewer, showcasing her golden-brown fur. At the lower end of this sloped platform, a set of two wooden steps provides access. In the center-right of the frame, a male lion, distinguished by a subtle mane, is sprawled across a flat, rectangular wooden platform that resembles a large table. He lies on his side, front paws dangling over the edge, and his head is turned slightly to the right with his mouth partially open, suggesting a state of deep relaxation or a stretch. This platform is also supported by several thick, rustic wooden posts. Further to the right and slightly lower, a third, similar empty wooden platform is visible, indicating ample resting spots for the animals. The background is filled with lush green foliage from trees and bushes, and a chain-link fence can be discerned through the greenery, marking the boundaries of the enclosure. The overall impression is one of peaceful serenity, with the powerful felines comfortably settled in their designated resting areas.

instruction: Swap the first two letters of the city named on the metal lid, and swap the D with the last M as well. Reverse the sequence of numbers at the lower half of the lid.

image_metadata.short_caption: A worn, circular metal lid embossed with "AMSTERDAM" in faded red and the number "943682," set against a tiled floor.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image provides a high-angle, top-down view of a circular, aged metal lid, likely made of aluminum, resting on a tiled floor. The lid's surface is a dull silver-grey, heavily textured with visible scuffs, scratches, and areas of discoloration and grime, suggesting significant wear and a history of use. Arcing across the upper half of the lid, the word "AMSTERDAM" is prominently embossed in capital letters, with the recessed letters retaining remnants of a faded red paint. Directly below this inscription, three parallel, horizontal raised lines are cast into the metal. A functional, integrated handle, also made of metal and exhibiting similar wear, is positioned on the left side of the lid, while a sturdy hinge or latch mechanism is fixed to the right side. In the lower half of the lid, a six-digit number, "943682," is deeply embossed into the surface. The background reveals a patterned floor composed of square tiles in varying shades of brown and beige, separated by dark grout lines. A section of a light-colored wall or cabinet is partially visible along the left edge of the frame, further defining the setting. The lighting is uniform, effectively illuminating the intricate details and textured surface of the metal object.

instruction: Make a woodcut print based on this painting.

image_metadata.short_caption: A vibrant ancient fresco depicts a procession of figures with varying skin tones, dressed in patterned loincloths, leading cattle and exotic animals like fawns and gazelles, suggesting a scene of tribute bearers or cultural exchange.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
This captivating image showcases a segment of an ancient fresco or wall painting, likely from Egypt or Nubia, depicting a vibrant procession of figures and animals. The artwork is characterized by its stylized forms, clear outlines, and the use of flat, bold colors against a light, textured background. The scene features a horizontal arrangement of six human figures, accompanied by various animals, suggesting a procession of tribute bearers or a scene of daily life and trade.

A striking feature is the depiction of distinct skin tones among the human figures: some are painted a reddish-brown, while others are a deep, almost black, color. All human figures share similar stylistic elements, including short, textured hair or caps, and small white hoop earrings. They are uniformly clad in intricately patterned loincloths, resembling leopard or cheetah prints.

From left to right, the first visible figure is a reddish-brown skinned man, carrying a large, dark log or beam across his shoulders. From this beam hangs a beautifully rendered spotted animal pelt, likely a leopard or cheetah skin. Following him is a dark-skinned man, gently cradling a small, spotted fawn or gazelle in his arms. His other hand appears to be guiding the formidable horns of a large, white-bodied cow with prominent black spots and sweeping, lyre-shaped horns. The cow itself is depicted with its head turned back, seemingly looking towards the dark-skinned figure.

Next in the procession are two figures, one dark-skinned and one reddish-brown. The dark-skinned man raises his hand in a gesture, possibly in conversation or command, while the reddish-brown man behind him looks back, his arms bent and hands held close to his chest. Below these figures, a slender, light-colored gazelle or antelope walks gracefully. Further to the right, another reddish-brown skinned figure is visible, appearing to lead a light-brown, dog-like animal, possibly a hound, while another similar animal is partially seen on the far right. The presence of both wild and domestic animals, along with the contrasting skin tones, strongly suggests a scene of foreign emissaries or tribute bearers, possibly from the southern lands of Nubia, bringing valuable and exotic goods to an Egyptian ruler or deity. The entire composition offers a fascinating glimpse into the cultural exchanges and artistic conventions of the ancient world.

instruction: Use tally marks in yellow chalk to indicate that seven of the birds were seen, three tufts were seen, and eight conks were seen.

image_metadata.short_caption: An interactive outdoor display asks "What did you see in the woods today?", featuring example images of a Pacific Wren, Sulphur Tuft mushrooms, and an Artist's Conk, with a chalkboard below for visitors to mark their observations.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image captures an outdoor interpretive display, likely found on a nature trail or in a park, designed to engage visitors. The primary subject is a dark, possibly black, chalkboard framed by warm-toned, natural wood. At the top of the display, two green horizontal strips with white text are visible. The front strip clearly reads, "What did you see in the woods today?" The back of this sign is partially visible and appears to be a mirrored reflection of the text "What did you see," with "today?" obscured, suggesting it's a double-sided sign. A small, vibrant blue piece of chalk rests on the upper edge of the wooden frame, to the right of the sign. Below the main question, three distinct framed photographs are horizontally arranged across the top of the chalkboard. From left to right, these images depict: a "Pacific Wren," a small, mottled brown bird; a cluster of "Sulphur Tuft" mushrooms, characterized by their yellowish-orange caps; and an "Artist's Conk," a large, shelf-like fungus growing on a tree trunk. Each image has its name clearly labeled in white text below it. The large chalkboard area beneath these images is black and appears well-used, covered with numerous thin, vertical and diagonal white scratches and smudges, indicative of past use with chalk. Faint vertical lines in a light blue hue segment the chalkboard below each image, suggesting areas where visitors can tally or mark their sightings. The natural wood framing on both sides of the display exhibits a distinct vertical grain pattern, adding to the rustic and natural aesthetic. The lighting suggests an outdoor setting, with clear visibility of all elements.

instruction: Write the color of each bulb on it using lower case, cursive font, and light up every bulb except for the red one.

image_metadata.short_caption: A large, colorful outdoor holiday display features five oversized Christmas light bulbs in yellow, orange, red, blue, and green, complete with giant green bases and a decorative plug, all set on a garland-covered platform against a reflective modern building.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image captures a vibrant and oversized Christmas light display set up outdoors, likely in an urban setting or commercial area during the holiday season. Five prominent light bulbs, each impressively large, dominate the foreground. From left to right, their colors are yellow, orange, red, blue, and a bright lime green. The yellow, red, blue, and lime green bulbs stand upright on large, cylindrical, fluted green bases designed to resemble the sockets of traditional holiday lights. The orange bulb, positioned slightly to the front left, is tilted on its side, revealing a green stem-like attachment. All the bulbs appear to be made of a smooth, glossy material, possibly plastic or fiberglass, and show faint speckled textures and possibly water droplets on their surfaces.

The entire arrangement rests on a raised, dark wooden or composite planter box, which is generously adorned with lush artificial green pine garland. This garland is subtly illuminated by numerous tiny, warm white fairy lights woven throughout its branches, adding to the festive glow. To the far right, partially obscured, is another oversized element: a light green electrical plug with yellow prongs, tipped over on its side and connected to a thick green "wire" that disappears behind the red bulb's base, further reinforcing the theme of a giant string of lights.

The ground in the foreground is a mottled gray aggregate pavement, featuring a section of dark metal grates embedded within it. A black, modern-looking spotlight or floodlight fixture rests on the ground to the far left, aimed upwards at the display. In the background, tall, modern buildings with dark, reflective glass facades stretch skyward. These windows reflect various elements, including parts of the building itself, interior lights, and notably, a large, ornate Christmas wreath decorated with gold and silver baubles and pinecones, visible in the reflection on the far-left window, reinforcing the holiday theme. The overall lighting suggests either a heavily overcast day or dusk, creating a soft, even illumination on the display.

instruction: Based on this view of the statue, create a comic book panel with a speech bubble to his mouth saying "You may choose to look the other way but you can never say again that you did not know."

image_metadata.short_caption: A detailed marble statue of a man with a striking, wry expression, dressed in a flowing coat, posed against a varied backdrop of stone and dark elements.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a compelling, close-up view of a finely crafted marble statue of a man, rendered in a light, off-white or cream-colored stone, with subtle darker markings suggesting age or natural patina. The figure is depicted from the chest up, possibly seated or reclining, leaning slightly against a curved stone backrest. His gaze is directed forward and slightly to the viewer's left, characterized by a highly expressive and unique facial expression: a furrowed brow, subtly squinted eyes, and a mouth that appears to be in a wry smirk, a slight scowl, or a look of discerning amusement, with pronounced wrinkles around the eyes and mouth conveying character and age. His hair is full and wavy, sculpted with realistic texture, swept back from his forehead. He is dressed in what appears to be a loose, heavy coat or robe with a broad, folded collar. The drapery of the garment is exquisitely carved, showcasing deep, voluminous folds and creases that convincingly mimic soft fabric. His right hand is prominently featured, resting on his left arm or lap, gripping or clutching a part of his clothing, with detailed fingers and knuckles clearly visible. The background varies: to the left, dark, textured vertical elements (possibly wood or a column) create a stark contrast, while behind the statue's head and upper body, a veined grey and white marble slab is visible. Below this, a plain, lighter-colored wall or surface forms the immediate backdrop, creating a gentle curve behind the statue's back. The lighting accentuates the statue's three-dimensional form, highlighting its intricate details and strong emotional presence.

instruction: Tidy this up: put the third standing book on top of the other two (and below the vase) and remove the loose sheaf of paper with musical notes on it. Remove the paper covered by the horn and then swap the positions of the violin and the horn. The hord should be vertical, standing on its bell flare, and the violin should be horizontal.

image_metadata.short_caption: A highly realistic still life painting by E. Harnett (1892), showcasing musical instruments, books, and household items meticulously arranged against a dark green wooden panel.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
This is a highly realistic, trompe l'oeil style oil painting by E. Harnett, dated 1892, depicting a meticulously arranged collection of musical instruments, books, and household objects set against a dark, muted green wooden panel background. The composition is vertically oriented, creating the illusion that the items are either hanging from or resting upon a narrow shelf or ledge integrated into the wooden surface.

At the upper center, a tarnished brass bugle or horn is prominently displayed, its warm metallic sheen providing a strong contrast against the cool green of the wooden planks. Beneath the horn, slightly angled, lies a worn, rectangular music book with a teal or blue-green cover, its edges frayed and a section torn to reveal faint musical notes beneath. Partially visible text on the cover includes "50," "NOUVELL...," and "POUR VIOLON." To the upper right, a heavily rusted, dark metal hinge, complete with visible bolts, is affixed to the wood, adding a touch of rustic detail. A similar, smaller metal keyhole escutcheon is seen on the mid-left.

Dominating the mid-to-lower right section is a richly toned wooden violin, rendered with exceptional detail, including its f-holes, bridge, and strings. Its bow rests diagonally alongside it, mirroring its form. Below these hanging elements, a narrow, dark wooden shelf or ledge horizontally extends across the painting, serving as a resting place for additional objects. On the left side of this shelf stands a distinctive white ceramic pitcher with a fluted neck, handle, and a pewter-colored lid, adorned with traditional blue decorative motifs depicting a pastoral landscape with a house and fence. Next to the pitcher, a stack of two old, seemingly leather-bound books, showing significant wear and tear, including one with a faded red spine, are carefully placed. Tucked beside the books is a tightly rolled piece of aged paper, possibly another manuscript or scroll, with partial text and numbers like "2311" and "1197" visible. Cascading over the edge of the shelf, a single sheet of off-white paper, precisely rendered with musical notation (staves, notes, clefs), appears slightly creased and aged, adding to the sense of a momentary pause.

The lighting in the painting appears to originate from the upper left, casting subtle, realistic shadows that imbue each object with remarkable depth and volume. Highlights on the brass, the violin's polished surface, and the ceramic pitcher suggest varied textures and materials. The deep green wooden background itself features vertical planks, visible grain, and small imperfections or nail heads, enhancing the overall illusion of a real, tactile surface. The overall palette is rich and subdued, emphasizing the vintage nature of the items and the masterful realism of the painting. The artist's signature "E. HARNETT 1892" is clearly visible in the bottom left corner, identifying the painting as a work by William Michael Harnett.

instruction: Add a bowl of petunias falling in the picture with the capybara, with a speech bubble going to the petunias. Written in the speech bubble is the expression written on the sticky note (remove the sticky note too). Also add a sperm whale falling head first in the sky outside the window, such that you can see the entire whale from head to tail.

image_metadata.short_caption: A framed black and white photo of a capybara peeking from a building window, adorned with a sticky note reading "Oh no not again," sits on a windowsill overlooking a hazy city skyline.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents an indoor perspective looking out through a large window onto a sprawling city skyline under an overcast sky. Dominating the lower center of the frame is a black-framed photograph, resting on a windowsill or ledge. This black and white print depicts a narrow urban street scene, with multi-story buildings lining both sides and a bustling crowd of people filling the street below. A prominent and whimsical detail within the photo is a capybara, a large rodent, peeking curiously out of an open window of one of the buildings. Attached to the top right corner of the photo frame is a light blue sticky note with handwritten text in dark ink that reads, "Oh no not again," adding a touch of humor and personality to the scene. Beyond the window and the framed photo, a vibrant urban landscape unfolds. Numerous modern skyscrapers, some with reflective glass facades and others with more traditional concrete and brick designs, rise into the hazy sky. Several buildings appear to be under construction, indicated by the presence of cranes. Towards the right side of the image, a winding river or waterway with tree-lined banks is visible, leading to bridges and further city development. The overall lighting is bright but diffused, consistent with an overcast day, and there are some subtle reflections or light streaks on the window glass itself.

instruction: Add four elephants, each pushing on a train car with its head, tilting the whole train over so that the wheels on the near side are lifted well of the track and the train is tilted at an angle. Add a huge gorilla hanging from the cross beam on the right and two orangutans hanging from the higher beam on the left, each holding on with one arm while pointing at the elephants with their other arms and laughing.

image_metadata.short_caption: A distinctive yellow and blue double-decker train is stationary on tracks within a grand, arched-roof train station.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image captures a detailed view of a modern train station interior, characterized by its impressive arched roof constructed from numerous glass panes and dark metal girders, allowing ample natural light to illuminate the space. Prominently positioned on the tracks in the foreground and mid-ground is a distinct double-decker train, sporting a vibrant yellow lower half and a deep blue upper section, with the number "7507" clearly visible on its front end, accompanied by two illuminated red lights. The train's livery also features the NS (Nederlandse Spoorwegen) logo on its side, indicating its Dutch origin. Multiple sets of tracks stretch into the distance, gently curving towards the right, with track identification markers such as "2569" and "2567A" visible on the ballast. To the right of the tracks, a clean, well-maintained platform extends, featuring standard white tactile paving with raised dots and parallel lines to guide passengers. Further along the platform, hints of station furniture like benches and digital information screens can be observed. Overhead catenary lines, essential for electric trains, crisscross beneath the magnificent roof structure. The overall lighting suggests either early morning or late afternoon, with a soft, diffused light filtering through the glass roof, complemented by the warm glow of artificial lights on the platform and within the train itself, creating a calm and functional atmosphere within this busy transportation hub.

instruction: Add the profile of the head of a zebra closely behind the open letters.

image_metadata.short_caption: A dark metal screen features the cut-out words "DREAM HICKORY," revealing a light brick wall and bright yellow industrial structures in the background.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a dark, possibly weathered metal screen or grate with two words, "DREAM HICKORY," laser-cut or punched out of its surface. The letters are capital, blocky, and geometrically stylized, allowing light to pass through and reveal the background. The texture of the metal appears slightly rough or matte. Through the cut-out letters, a background of light-colored brickwork is visible, predominantly in the upper half of the image, suggesting an interior wall. Below the brickwork, particularly in the lower half and behind the second word "HICKORY," bright yellow and hints of orange structures or equipment are visible, possibly scaffolding, pipes, or machinery, indicating an industrial, construction, or storage environment. The lighting appears even, suggesting an indoor setting with artificial illumination. The composition is a head-on view, with the metal screen filling almost the entire frame horizontally, emphasizing the typography and the subtle depth created by the background elements.

instruction: Turn this into a real scene on the Nile, with real hippos and palm trees, and the Giza pyramids in the background, surrounded by desert.

image_metadata.short_caption: A large outdoor exhibit features roaring hippo sculptures and artificial plants, with Egyptian pyramids and natural trees in the background under an overcast sky.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a whimsical outdoor exhibit featuring several large, stylized hippopotamus sculptures or lanterns, set against a backdrop reminiscent of ancient Egypt. In the mid-ground, two prominent hippos stand facing each other with their mouths wide open, exposing their large, pointed teeth. The hippo on the left is a lighter, grayish-beige, while the one on the right is a darker reddish-brown. Their surfaces appear to have a textured, layered quality, common in large-scale lantern displays. To the far left in the foreground, the head of a third, darker grey hippo rests low on the vibrant green grass. The ground is also adorned with numerous artificial green plants, some resembling palm fronds, and several striking blue and purple lotus flowers with yellow centers, adding splashes of color. A low, white string fence or barrier crisscrosses the grassy area in the foreground. In the background, two large, light brown pyramid structures, textured to resemble ancient stone, rise prominently, anchoring the Egyptian theme. Behind and surrounding the pyramids, a dense line of natural green trees forms a lush, forested horizon. The sky overhead is overcast and a uniform light gray, casting a soft, diffused light over the entire scene, highlighting the intricate details and colors of the exhibit. The overall impression is that of a large, imaginative display, possibly part of a festival, zoo, or themed park.

instruction: Create a poster: take the design from the leather wallet and make it a colorful image on a landscape oriented poster, and write "Third Symphony" in black Bauhaus Bold font below it on the poster.

image_metadata.short_caption: A vintage, hand-tooled brown leather coin purse with a metal clasp rests on a textured gray and white woven fabric, featuring a note with "GORECKI" tucked inside.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a vintage, intricately hand-tooled brown leather coin purse or small wallet, resting on a textured, woven fabric background. The purse features a classic metal clasp mechanism with two decorative spherical knobs that meet at the top. The leather itself is a warm, medium-brown hue, showing a rich patina and subtle signs of wear, indicating its age and history. The front surface of the purse is elaborately adorned with deeply embossed floral and organic patterns, centered around a prominent blossom surrounded by swirling foliage, all framed by a decorative border. The edges of the purse are further embellished with contrasting dark, possibly black, leather lacing, adding a rustic, handcrafted detail to its semi-circular form. Tucked behind the metal clasp and extending upwards is a small, white piece of lined paper with the name "GORECKI" handwritten in black capital letters. The background fabric is a soft, woolen material with a distinct chevron or herringbone-like weave, combining shades of light gray, off-white, and darker gray threads, providing a cozy and natural backdrop. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the textures of both the leather and the fabric, creating an inviting and timeless aesthetic.

instruction: Have the minute hand point toward the R in PARIS and have the hour hand point toward the R in ORLEANS.

image_metadata.short_caption: A close-up of the impressive clock on the facade of the Musée d'Orsay in Paris, featuring Roman numerals, ornate stone carvings, and the historic "Paris-Orleans" inscription.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a captivating close-up of a magnificent and ornate clock face adorning the stone facade of a grand, historic building, identifiable as the former Gare d'Orsay, now the Musée d'Orsay, in Paris. The architectural style exudes Beaux-Arts grandeur, characterized by its intricate detailing and classical elements. Centrally positioned, the large circular clock features a pale blue face contrasted with bold, dark Roman numerals from I to XII. The hour hand points just past the X, while the minute hand rests precisely at the 52-minute mark, indicating the time is approximately 10:52. The clock is encased within a deeply recessed, arched alcove, framed by richly carved stone ornamentation that includes flowing leafy patterns and a detailed central decorative crest above the clock's dial. Directly beneath the clock, the words "PARIS-ORLEANS" are prominently carved into the stone, revealing the building's original function as a railway station. Flanking the clock, on either side, are decorative cartouches containing the initials "PO," further emphasizing its historical connection to the Paris-Orléans railway line. Below these, partial inscriptions of city names, "AGEN" and "ALBI," are visible on the lower section of the facade, suggesting destinations served by the railway. Above the clock, the building's roofline is visible, constructed of dark, horizontally laid tiles that create a structured, stepped appearance. The entire facade is meticulously crafted from light-colored stone, possibly limestone, featuring intricate horizontal courses and various sculpted motifs. The soft, even lighting suggests an overcast day, which beautifully highlights the detailed artistry of the stone carvings, lending the scene an air of timeless elegance and historical significance.

instruction: Bring this statue to life! Remove the pedestal and put a real life George Washington and real life horse on the ground, but in the same position. Put the yellow flowers at the base delicately in the horse's mouth.

image_metadata.short_caption: An equestrian statue of George Washington stands prominently in a city park, backed by a modern skyline under an overcast sky.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image presents a striking equestrian statue of George Washington, rendered in a dark, possibly bronze, material, set against a backdrop of a modern city skyline under a uniformly overcast sky. Washington is depicted wearing a military uniform and a tricorn hat, seated atop a dynamically posed horse with its front left leg raised high, conveying a sense of movement and power. The statue rests on a substantial, multi-tiered granite pedestal of a light grey hue, with the name "WASHINGTON" clearly inscribed in relief on its visible face. At the very base of the pedestal, on the first step, a single, vibrant yellow flower adds a small burst of color to the otherwise subdued palette.

The statue is situated within what appears to be a public park or garden, characterized by well-maintained grassy areas and low, decorative chain-link fencing in the foreground. Several dark green, conical-shaped bushes are interspersed within the landscape, alongside numerous deciduous trees that are bare of leaves, suggesting either late winter or early spring. Hints of park pathways, streetlights, and a few distant figures, some seated on benches, can be observed further back in the park. The background is dominated by a diverse urban skyline, featuring a collection of modern skyscrapers and older buildings of varying heights, architectural styles, and materials, including glass and stone facades. The pale grey, cloudy sky casts a soft, diffused light over the entire scene, contributing to a stately yet somewhat muted atmosphere.

instruction: For every digit painted on the sides of these platforms, subtract 2 from any digits greater than 5 and add 3 to any digits less than 5.

image_metadata.short_caption: Three blue fabric-covered robot bases, each marked with white numbers (7736, 3081, 2668), are stacked in a workshop environment.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays three rectangular objects, likely robot chassis or bases, neatly stacked vertically in what appears to be a workshop or industrial setting. Each object is predominantly covered in a royal blue fabric, which serves as a protective bumper or cover, and features distinct white numbers painted on its visible side. The topmost object, which forms the core of the stack, is partially open on its upper surface, revealing intricate internal components. These include a metallic skeletal frame with numerous circular cutouts, several small electric motors connected by a tangle of red and black wires, and what appear to be gears or sprockets suggesting a drive train. The blue fabric on this top piece is slightly creased, and the numbers "7736" are painted onto it in a somewhat informal, hand-brushed style. Directly beneath, the second object is fully encased in the same blue fabric, bearing the numbers "3081" prominently. The third and final object rests on the floor, also covered in the blue fabric, with the numbers "2668" visible. The floor itself is a muted grey concrete, showing signs of dust and minor scuff marks. The background is blurred but suggests a typical workshop environment, with glimpses of industrial equipment, including a yellow container, dark machinery, a blue pipe, and a partial sign on a dark object that reads "no messy filter inside!". The overall scene conveys an organized collection of robotics components, possibly associated with a competition or development project.

instruction: Turn this into a vibrant classical oil landscape painting, with deep and dramatic brushstrokes to capture the flow of the trees and the mountains.

image_metadata.short_caption: A breathtaking panoramic view of snow-capped mountains towering over a lush forest and a vast sagebrush field under a clear blue sky.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image captures a grand panoramic vista of a majestic mountain range under a vibrant, cloudless blue sky. In the background, a series of imposing peaks, heavily dusted with bright white snow, dominate the horizon. The central peak is particularly striking, rising sharply to a pointed, snow-covered summit, flanked by other rugged, jagged peaks and ridges. The lower slopes of the mountains are covered in dense, dark green coniferous forests, which visually anchor the snow-capped summits to the terrain below.

The midground is characterized by an expansive belt of lush green trees, primarily evergreens, forming a deep forest. Interspersed among the darker conifers are patches of lighter green, possibly deciduous trees like aspens, adding variety to the verdant canopy. A few skeletal, dead trees with white or light gray branches stand out within this forest, providing a natural contrast to the living foliage.

In the foreground, a vast, open field stretches across the lower portion of the frame. This area is largely covered in low-lying, silvery-green and muted gray-green sagebrush, giving the landscape a characteristic texture. Patches of brighter green grass are also visible, hinting at the underlying fertility of the land. The lighting is bright and clear, suggesting a sunny day, which illuminates the scene with sharp detail and vibrant colors, particularly the deep blue of the sky and the varied greens of the vegetation. The overall impression is one of immense natural beauty, tranquility, and the awe-inspiring scale of the mountain wilderness.

instruction: Turn this into a photorealistic scene.

image_metadata.short_caption: A charming miniature diorama depicts paper cut-out figures in a retro-styled living room, enjoying tea and holiday cards while snow falls outside the window.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a charming and detailed miniature diorama, recreating a cozy, mid-century modern living room scene. The foreground features a light-colored, perhaps off-white, carpet that covers the floor. Seated on this carpet are two paper cut-out figures, artfully positioned to appear three-dimensional within the setting. To the left, a man, depicted with a calm expression, wears a light brown jacket over a V-neck shirt and grey pants, with his legs crossed. He is comfortably settled in a vibrant, pumpkin-orange swivel armchair, which boasts a brass pedestal base with a four-pronged foot design. To the right, a woman, with short dark hair and a pleasant gaze, is seated on a long, structured sofa. She is dressed in a light pink top and a grey skirt, with her hands resting gently in her lap. The sofa is upholstered in a striking pattern of vertical orange and reddish-brown stripes, and it has a dark, possibly black, base. Between the two figures, a small, dark wooden coffee table stands on a delicate brass pedestal base with four curved feet. On the table, two miniature deep-blue teacups with matching saucers are neatly placed. Next to them, closer to the woman, are two tiny holiday-themed cards: one, white, reads "MERRY MERRY" with a red sleigh design, and the other, cream-colored, says "BAG OF WISHES" with a depiction of a sleigh and reindeer. The background wall is textured with a woven or slatted pattern in a warm, earthy beige or light brown tone, creating visual interest. To the left, behind the man, a green rectangular planter holds various artificial green and reddish-brown plants, adding a touch of nature. Towards the center-right, a classic table lamp with a white fabric shade and gold trim rests on a decorative brass base, subtly illuminating the scene. Further to the right, a large window reveals a snowy outdoor landscape. Bare trees, distant buildings, and a wintry sky are visible, with small white specks indicating falling snow. A sheer white, lace-patterned curtain hangs gracefully on the left side of the window. The entire setup evokes a sense of nostalgic comfort and warmth, possibly during the holiday season.

instruction: Change the colors of the word GOOGLE to its traditional color scheme (blue, red, yellow, blue, green, red, respectively) and change the elevator level to C3.

image_metadata.short_caption: Frosted white "GOOGLE ★ LOBBY" signage is prominently displayed on a glass panel, with a blurred interior background featuring a "B2" sign.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a clear, eye-level shot of large, frosted white letters applied to a transparent glass panel, likely serving as a door or partition within a modern office building. The prominent signage spells out "GOOGLE" in the upper line and, directly beneath it, a distinct five-pointed star preceding "LOBBY". The letters, appearing as if made from etched or frosted vinyl, exhibit varying degrees of opacity and reflectivity due to the lighting; portions like the "GLE" in "GOOGLE" and the "BBY" in "LOBBY" appear brighter and more opaque, while the "GOO" and the star and "LO" are slightly darker and more translucent. Through the clear areas of the glass and behind the letters, a softly lit, blurred indoor environment is visible. A dark rectangular sign with the white text "B2" is faintly discernible in the background, positioned between the two lines of text. The overall background consists of indistinct shapes and muted tones of light brown, gray, and white, suggesting interior walls, possibly an elevator door, or a distant hallway. Subtle reflections are present on the glass surface, indicating its transparent nature, and a few minor smudges or dust particles are visible on some of the letters, particularly the first "G" and "O" of "GOOGLE". The composition directly focuses on the signage, conveying a sense of entry into a professional, Google-branded space.

instruction: Order all these drinks alphabetically from top to bottom, maintining the same color, hand-writing and icons as in their original positions.

image_metadata.short_caption: A whiteboard displays a handwritten list of beverages including "warm beer," "glühwein," "tea," "MATE," "hot chocolate + 1000," and "root beer," with simple hand-drawn illustrations for some of the drinks.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a white dry-erase board covered with a handwritten list of various beverages, accompanied by simple, hand-drawn illustrations for some of the items. The text is written with markers of different colors: teal/light green, black, and purple. At the top, in teal, are the words "warm beer". Below this, in black, is "glühwein," with three small, curved lines ("sss") above it, suggesting steam. To the left, also in black, is "tea," alongside a simple black outline drawing of a teacup on a saucer, from which three "sss" lines also emanate, indicating heat. Beneath "tea," the word "MATE" is written in uppercase black letters, next to a black drawing of a cylindrical cup with a vertical line representing a straw or bombilla. Near the bottom, "hot chocolate" is written in teal, followed by "+ 1000" in black. At the very bottom, in purple marker, are the words "root beer". The casual presentation suggests a drink menu or a list of available options.

image_metadata.short_caption: An "OPEN" neon sign and a "Halal" LED display are prominently featured on a food truck or stall, with two containers of food visible below them.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a close-up view of a food establishment, likely a food truck or a stall, indicated by the visible signs and food containers. On the left, a prominent red neon sign illuminates the word "OPEN" against a dark background, signaling that the business is currently operating. Below this sign, a thin line of blue neon light adds a colorful accent. To the right, a black LED matrix display board is brightly lit with amber or orange pixels, clearly spelling out "Halal." The word is further accentuated by decorative dashed lines of the same light, framing the text on the LED screen. Below the signs, resting on what appears to be a white or light-yellow surface of the food unit, are two rectangular foil containers filled with food. The container on the left holds a dark, possibly baked good, covered generously with white icing or sauce, reminiscent of a dessert. The container to its right contains lighter, elongated pieces of food, possibly fries or a similar savory item. In the background, a muted grey structure is visible above the signs, while a vibrant red surface, possibly an awning or a countertop, occupies the lower right portion of the frame. The overall impression is that of an active and inviting food service business, catering to specific dietary needs.

instruction: Update this painting to show the scene after the person has (1) dropped the coin on top of the pearls, (2) taken the ring off their index finger and placed it next to the bowl of pearls in the bottom right of the image, (3) grasped the glass vial with their right hand, and (4) is pointing at the large coin in the upper right with the pointer finger of their left hand.

image_metadata.short_caption: A detailed painting captures a hand amidst a collection of golden coins, ornate rings, pearls in a pouch, and a lavish glass goblet on a green surface, conveying a scene of wealth and valuation.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a meticulously detailed segment of an oil painting, likely from a historical period, focusing on an array of valuable objects arranged on a vibrant green surface, presumably a tabletop. A human hand, rendered with remarkable realism and light skin tones, occupies the upper central area, seemingly in the act of handling or placing golden coins. A prominent emerald-green ring adorns one of its fingers, and a reddish cuff or sleeve is visible around the wrist, indicating the presence of a robed figure. To the left, a tall, ornate clear glass goblet or vase stands, featuring intricate fluted designs on its body and a richly detailed bronze-colored base and decorative finial on its lid, reflecting light beautifully. Scattered across the green surface are numerous gold coins, some in a large central pile with various embossed patterns, and others spread individually, including a few being held by the hand. Adjacent to the goblet, a small rolled-up scroll or piece of parchment is adorned with several gold rings, each set with a different colored gemstone. In the lower center, a small, dark, velvety pouch lies open, revealing a cluster of luminous white pearls, adding another dimension to the theme of luxury and wealth. To the right, part of a delicate gold balance scale is discernible, with one pan holding additional coins, suggesting the act of weighing or valuing the currency. The background behind the hand and objects is a dark, muted gray, providing a stark contrast that highlights the brightly illuminated items on the table. The painting's exquisite detail and rich textures create a sense of tangible opulence and historical narrative.

instruction: Based on this bust of Polyphemus, create a color comic strip panel showing him with his arms in the air and shouting (with a speech bubble): "Nobody has harmed me, Nobody is trying to kill me!"

image_metadata.short_caption: A striking close-up of an ancient stone bust depicting a cyclops, featuring a single eye and a meticulously carved beard and hair.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a detailed, close-up photograph of an ancient-style stone bust, likely crafted from light-colored marble or limestone, exhibiting a weathered and aged appearance. The sculpture depicts the head and the upper portion of the neck of a male figure. Its most distinctive feature is a single, centrally placed eye on the forehead, clearly identifying the subject as a cyclops from Greek mythology. This prominent eye is framed by heavily sculpted brow ridges above and a full, almost fleshy lower lid, lending the figure a stern or contemplative expression. Below the eye, a broad, somewhat flattened nose leads to full, slightly parted lips, giving the impression of an open mouth. A voluminous, intricately carved beard with swirling, curly locks frames the chin and jawline, extending upwards to meet similarly rendered wavy hair that cascades from the crown of the head. The surface of the sculpture shows visible signs of age, with subtle abrasions, pitting, and a general textural roughness consistent with ancient stone. The lighting is soft and diffused, illuminating the contours and depth of the carving without harsh shadows, which suggests an indoor display, possibly in a museum. The background is a muted, uniformly dark gray, heavily blurred to create a strong contrast that emphasizes the light-toned sculpture. Faint horizontal lines or grids are barely discernible in the lower right portion of the background, hinting at display shelving or a protective barrier. The overall impression conveyed by the image is one of timeless antiquity, mythical power, and sculptural artistry.

instruction: Move and shrink the globe so it appears in the sky, exactly covering the sun. Write the words "fly me to the moon" in cursive black marker on the table.

image_metadata.short_caption: A desk globe displaying Africa sits on a wooden table, overlooking a sunlit city skyline featuring the Transamerica Pyramid through a large window.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The photograph presents an interior scene centered on a vintage-style desk globe prominently positioned on a light-colored wooden table in the foreground. The globe, a key focal point, clearly displays the continent of Africa with various countries such as Mali, Niger, Chad, Sudan, Mauritania, Ivory Coast, Gabon, Congo, Zambia, Tanzania, Mozambique, Botswana, and South Africa, along with the Equator and Prime Meridian. The oceans are labeled "OCEAN." The globe rests on a sturdy, dark, metallic-looking base, which casts a gentle shadow on the table's surface, revealing numerous fine scratches and a distinct wood grain. Beyond the globe, a large, multi-paned window dominates the background, framed by dark vertical mullions. Through the window, a silhouetted city skyline unfolds under a bright, cloudy sky. A highly recognizable, spired skyscraper, resembling the Transamerica Pyramid, stands out distinctly among the urban buildings. The sky is intensely bright, with the sun visible and producing a soft, colorful halo or lens flare effect, suggesting either early morning or late afternoon light. Horizontal lines, possibly from window blinds or architectural details, are visible across the upper portion of the sky. To the far left, partially obscured, are glimpses of dark office furniture, including what appears to be a computer monitor. The overall image conveys a sense of calm and contemplation, bridging the exploration of the world with the immediate urban environment.

instruction: Restore this broken clock so it is like new, fixing the crack and painting the background and numbers perfectly. Add the clock hands in and set them to show 7:15.

image_metadata.short_caption: A severely damaged and dirt-covered wall clock, split vertically through its center, appears to be an artifact of environmental trauma.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: This image presents a heavily damaged and dirt-encrusted square-shaped wall clock, likely made of plastic or composite material designed to resemble wood, with a severe vertical split running through its center. The dark, multi-tiered frame is also fractured at the top, aligning with the central crack on the clock face. The clock's face, originally a light, possibly cream or off-white color, is significantly discolored and covered in a thick layer of dried mud, dirt, and debris, particularly concentrated on the right side. Large, metallic-looking Arabic numerals from 1 to 12 are embossed on the face, with some numbers like '1', '2', '3', '4', '5' and parts of '6' largely obscured by the grime, while '10', '9', '8', '7', '11', and '12' are more clearly visible. In the upper middle section of the dial, the brand "MAG" is visible in silver lettering, and below it, the words "SILENT QUARTZ" are faintly discernible, indicating the type of movement. The clock hands are absent or entirely hidden by the damage and dirt. The overall appearance suggests the clock has suffered severe environmental trauma, possibly from a flood or burial, transforming it into a poignant artifact of decay or disaster. It appears to be displayed against a light background, possibly in an exhibition or a workshop, with a calendar partially visible on the left side of the frame.

instruction: Follow the instruction on the bottom of the lid.

image_metadata.short_caption: DETAILED: A clean white toilet with its seat and lid up, featuring a humorous decal on the seat that reads "PUT ME DOWN" with a hand icon, alongside a sleek stainless steel plunger on a wooden floor.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a straight-on, eye-level shot of a white porcelain toilet with its seat and lid both in the upright position, revealing the inside of the bowl. Dominating the upper part of the toilet seat is a humorous message printed in black capital letters that reads "PUT ME DOWN," where the word "ME" is cleverly replaced by a stylized hand icon with fingers pointing downwards, humorously indicating the desired action for the toilet seat. The toilet bowl is clean and glossy white, resting on a light brown wooden floor, likely laminate or hardwood, with a white baseboard running along the wall behind it. To the left and slightly behind the toilet, a silver-colored grab bar or towel rack is mounted horizontally on the plain, light-colored wall. To the right of the toilet, a contemporary stainless steel plunger with a black handle is neatly stored in its matching metallic canister. A white label on the plunger's canister is partially visible, indicating "Stainless Steel Plunger Made By Design." The overall scene suggests a clean, well-maintained bathroom with a touch of personality through the toilet seat decal.

instruction: Time for musical parking spots! The white vehicle at the bottom moves to the empty parking spot, and a yellow Lamborghini Aventador fills the spot it leaves at the bottom. The gray vehicle (second from the top) moves over to the handicapped parking spot. Make sure not to include a large blue pickup truck anywhere.

image_metadata.short_caption: An aerial view of an asphalt parking lot featuring cars, directional arrows, a handicapped space, and dense tree foliage along a red curb.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image provides an elevated, overhead perspective of an outdoor parking lot, likely captured from a building or structure, as suggested by a slight haze or reflection visible towards the bottom of the frame. The ground is dark, worn asphalt, exhibiting numerous cracks and areas where the surface appears faded. A prominent red curb or painted border runs vertically along the left edge of the parking area, with faint white text "FIRE LANE" barely discernible on its surface. White painted markings are spread across the asphalt. In the upper left quadrant, a clear, white arrow points upwards, indicating a directional flow, and directly below it, a more faded arrow points in the same direction. To the upper right, a designated handicapped parking space is distinctly marked with white diagonal stripes within a rectangular white outline and a vibrant blue square featuring the universal white wheelchair symbol. A silver or light grey sedan is parked within or adjacent to this handicapped spot, its rear visible. Further down the right side of the parking lot, several more vehicles are parked: a dark-colored SUV or large car, followed by a white or light-colored car, and then a modern white SUV. The very bottom of the frame shows the front portion of another white vehicle. Between the second and third visible parked cars (the black and first white one), a slender, light-colored fixture or post on a dark base stands on the asphalt. A significant portion of the image, particularly along the right side and extending over the parked cars, is dominated by dense tree foliage. The trees display various shades of green, from deep emerald to lighter olive tones, with some sections showing brownish or yellowish leaves, suggesting different species or the time of year. The tree canopy casts diffuse shadows, partially obscuring the vehicles and pavement. The overall lighting suggests a daytime scene, possibly under an overcast sky or with diffuse sunlight, given the lack of harsh, defined shadows. The scene captures a typical, mundane parking facility integrated with green landscaping.

instruction: Put in three knights in armor riding war horses riding single file along the path toward the viewer, carrying long upright lances. Also add a huge dragon flying in the upper right, with its wings spread wide so that the wingtips spread from the top of the tree on the left to the top of the tree on the right. The dragon is breathing fire down toward the knights below.

image_metadata.short_caption: Sunset paints the sky over a vibrant city skyline, viewed from a tranquil park with a winding path.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image captures a picturesque urban landscape at sunset, viewed from an elevated position within a park or green space. The sky is a dramatic canvas of golden, orange, and yellow hues near the horizon, blending into softer grays and blues higher up, with scattered clouds catching the warm light. Dominating the distant midground is a vibrant city skyline, featuring several distinctive modern skyscrapers, including the iconic Gherkin and what appears to be the Walkie-Talkie building. The setting sun, a brilliant orb of light, is positioned low on the horizon, partially obscured by the city's structures, creating a powerful silhouette effect and lens flare. Below the bustling cityscape, a dense canopy of lush green trees forms a natural divide. In the foreground, a wide, light-colored paved pathway, constructed from brick pavers, stretches into the distance, narrowing as it recedes. A solitary figure is visible walking away from the viewer on this path, adding a human element to the vast scene. The pathway is flanked by patches of grass, some dry and others more verdant, along with trimmed bushes and two tall, dark lampposts on either side, their presence hinting at the transition from daylight to evening. The overall composition beautifully contrasts the natural serenity of the park with the dynamic, modern urban environment, bathed in the warm, evocative light of the setting sun.

instruction: It's 4:40pm - make all the clocks show this time!

image_metadata.short_caption: A collection of various decorative wall clocks, ranging from large skeleton pocket watch styles to ornate square and round designs, are displayed on a reddish-brown wall.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a vibrant display of various decorative clocks arranged artfully on a reddish-brown wall, creating a gallery-like effect. Dominating the upper-left is a large, circular clock resembling an oversized pocket watch, featuring a golden-bronze frame with a top loop and two small protrusions, typical of old-fashioned timepieces. Its dark face showcases Roman numerals (I through XII), minute markers, and a captivating skeleton movement with visible brass gears and cogs, suggesting a mechanical design. The time on this clock appears to be approximately 3:15. To its right, higher up, is a smaller, simpler round clock with a dark brown, possibly wooden, frame and a white face adorned with Roman numerals and the text "Authentique." This clock shows roughly 3:10. Below and to the left of the large skeleton clock, partially obscured on the far left, is a tall, dark, rectangular object, possibly a speaker or decorative column. Further down and slightly to the right, a brass-colored clock shaped like a classic pocket watch, with a crown and pushers, features a white face with sub-dials and the inscription "GONNEVILLE AUTOMATIC." The hands on its main dial indicate a time of about 10:10. To its right is a medium-sized round clock with a textured, ornate golden-bronze frame and a white face displaying Arabic numerals (1 through 12), with hands indicating roughly 10:45. In the lower-left portion of the image, below the dark rectangular object, is another round clock with a dark brown frame and a white face with Arabic numerals, similar in style to the ornate golden one but without the textured frame; it shows about 9:40. Immediately to the right of this clock, a white remote control is attached to the wall. Finally, in the bottom right, a striking square-framed clock adds a different geometric element. This clock has a dark frame interspersed with smaller square inserts of ornate, golden, embossed metal, bordering a central round clock face with Roman numerals and the "Authentique" text, indicating a time of roughly 1:50. The overall composition suggests a curated collection, emphasizing different styles and eras of horology.

instruction: Add two real, large winged gargoyles, one on the left support and and the other on the right support, looking down at a tall, realistic grim reaper figure. The grim reaper is holding a scythe and looking menacingly at the viewer. Make sure the new additions have interesting coloration and look like they are really there, not like crappy photoshop or digital drawings.

image_metadata.short_caption: A grand, weathered stone funerary monument, intricately carved in Baroque style with allegorical figures and skulls, stands solemnly in the rain amidst green trees.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
This image presents a large, ornate stone funerary monument or epitaph, captured outdoors under a steady rain. The structure dominates the frame, appearing tall and imposing, crafted from dark, weathered stone, possibly granite or a similar durable material, showing signs of age, erosion, and biological growth like moss or lichen. The rain is visible as streaks and droplets on the stone surfaces, giving them a wet, slightly reflective sheen and enhancing the somber atmosphere.

The monument is intricately designed in what appears to be a Baroque or late Renaissance style, composed of several distinct tiers. At the very top, a crowning pediment with volutes surmounts a central relief depicting a seated allegorical figure, possibly a putto or an angel, holding an object that might be an hourglass or lamp, surrounded by clouds or drapery. Flanking this central relief are two standing female figures, classical in their drapery, positioned within shallow niches, appearing to be allegorical representations (e.g., Hope, Charity, or Mourning).

The middle and most prominent section features a grand central panel, likely intended for an inscription, which is now heavily eroded or blank. Below it, a smaller, highly detailed relief showcases a skull and crossbones flanked by two roundels containing what appear to be carved portrait busts. This central area is flanked on either side by two large, fluted columns with ornate capitals (resembling Corinthian or composite order), supporting an elaborate entablature. Between each pair of columns, within deep arched niches, stand two large draped figures. The figure on the left appears to be headless, while the one on the right is largely intact, both possibly representing virtues, saints, or mourning figures. Small decorative busts or faces are carved above the columns.

The base of the monument is also richly decorated with sculpted panels. These include grotesque masks or winged skulls, intricate floral and foliate scrollwork, a small standing putto or cherub, and a prominent coat of arms or heraldic shield surmounted by a crown or helmet. The ground immediately in front of the monument is dirt and patchy grass with scattered fallen leaves, indicating an outdoor, likely cemetery or churchyard setting. In the background, lush green trees provide a natural backdrop, while a hint of a modern building with a glass facade is visible on the far right, creating a juxtaposition between old and new. The overcast sky suggests a dreary day, further emphasizing the monument's historical and solemn presence.

instruction: Remove all instances of letters that are found in the first and last names of the first president of the United States of America. Also, color all instances of the third letter of the alphabet in blue.

image_metadata.short_caption: A dark gray sign displays four white-lettered rules for a water feature, prohibiting non-service animals, requiring adult supervision for children, and outlining health-related restrictions.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image prominently features a dark gray or charcoal-colored sign, displaying a set of rules or guidelines written in clear, white, uppercase, sans-serif text. The sign is oriented vertically, presenting four distinct bullet points, each marked by a small white circle. The first rule states, "CHILDREN REQUIRE ADULT SUPERVISION." The second rule specifies, "NON-SERVICE ANIMALS PROHIBITED." The third rule, which spans two lines, reads, "CHANGING DIAPERS WITHIN 6 FEET OF THE WATER FEATURE IS PROHIBITED." The fourth and final rule, also spanning two lines, states, "USE OF THE WATER FEATURE IF ILL WITH A CONTAGIOUS DISEASE IS PROHIBITED." The dark background of the sign has a subtle, granular texture with scattered, faint lighter specks, possibly indicating slight wear, dust, or water droplets. The white lettering stands out sharply against the dark surface, ensuring excellent legibility. The left eye (from the viewer's perspective) is wide, darkly outlined, and gazes directly and intensely at the viewer, imbuing the artwork with a profound sense of introspection or confrontation. The mouth is a subtle, slightly downturned line, and the nose is suggested by strong, deliberate strokes. Hints of vibrant orange and red are visible on the figure's upper arm or shoulder area, providing a small burst of contrasting color.

The background consists of a vast, light blue sky, fading into warmer, faint yellow and white tones near the horizon, with soft, wispy clouds adding a sense of atmosphere. A low, indistinct horizon line separates the expansive sky from the foreground, which is depicted with abstract, textured patches of muted greens, browns, and grays, further emphasizing the figure's deep connection to the earth. The overall artistic style is characterized by visible brushwork and a rough, almost primal aesthetic, conveying strong emotion and a sense of raw, elemental existence.

image_metadata.short_caption: An oil painting by John Constable shows Salisbury Cathedral rising majestically behind a pastoral scene with cows grazing in a meadow and drinking from a stream, framed by large trees and set against a dramatic, cloudy sky.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: This is a masterful oil painting depicting Salisbury Cathedral, majestically rising in the background of a serene, pastoral landscape. The Gothic cathedral, with its iconic, impossibly tall spire, dominates the central and upper portions of the composition, rendered in luminous whites and pale grays that suggest its stone construction. The intricate details of its buttresses, windows, and decorative elements are visible, particularly around the main body of the building. The sky above is a dramatic expanse of swirling clouds, featuring patches of bright white against deeper blues and grays, hinting at changeable weather and creating a dynamic backdrop that accentuates the cathedral's height. The foreground is a lush green meadow, framed on either side by large, ancient trees with rich, textured foliage and sturdy trunks. These trees, especially the gnarled one on the left with a long, sweeping branch, act as natural framing elements, guiding the viewer's eye towards the central subject. A calm, narrow stream meanders across the immediate foreground, with one brown cow standing in it, drinking, its reflection visible in the water. Several other cows are scattered across the meadow: a light-colored one grazing to the left of the stream, a darker one with white markings by the stream's edge on the right, and another partially visible further right. Small human figures can be faintly discerned on the distant grounds near the cathedral, providing a sense of scale to the grand structure. The overall atmosphere is one of tranquil grandeur, characteristic of a Romantic landscape painting, emphasizing both the natural beauty of the English countryside and the architectural splendor of the cathedral.
