image_metadata.short_caption: A chillingly ornate wall of human skulls and bones, meticulously arranged in an ancient ossuary, forming intricate patterns.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image captures a densely packed wall of human bones and skulls, meticulously arranged to form a striking, macabre display. Dominating the center is a large, symmetrical pattern created from numerous human skulls and long bones. This central motif resembles an upright figure or a cross, featuring a prominent skull at its apex, flanked by two other skulls, and a vertical stack of multiple skulls forming the "body" of the design. Surrounding and supporting this central arrangement, the entire background is filled with countless other human bones, primarily shorter, irregular fragments, possibly vertebrae or other various skeletal pieces, stacked tightly to create a solid, textured wall. The bones appear aged, dry, and range in color from light brown to beige, indicating their antiquity. The lighting is dim and atmospheric, casting soft shadows that accentuate the three-dimensional contours and depth of the bone formations, contributing to a somber and reverent mood. The perspective is a close-up, eye-level shot, allowing the viewer to appreciate the intricate details of the bone arrangements and the sheer volume of human remains.

instruction: Swap the figures on the left and the right and turn the cup upside down, with its handle pointed to the left.

image_metadata.short_caption: Three decorative objects—a wooden animal carving, a personalized mug, and an Egyptian-style stone statue—are displayed side-by-side on a shelf.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays three decorative objects arranged on a light-colored surface, likely a shelf or table, against a plain, light grey background. On the far left is a dark wooden carving, appearing to be a stylized animal, possibly a monkey or a dog. It has a squat, sturdy build with prominent features, including a large snout or mouth with a hint of red color inside, and dark, hollowed-out eyes. The carving shows vertical lines suggesting texture or fur and rests on a rectangular base. In the center, a white ceramic mug with a vibrant blue rim and handle is prominently featured. The mug's body is adorned with a collage of various small photographs, including images of classic cars, landscapes, and what appears to be a basketball. Overlaid on this collage is a central graphic of a white t-shirt with red sleeves, displaying the word "BALDRIDGE" in black letters at the top and the number "23" in large black numerals below it. To the far right stands a dark, speckled stone statue reminiscent of an ancient Egyptian pharaoh or deity. The statue depicts a standing figure wearing a traditional nemes headdress, a false beard, and an elaborate tunic. The stone has a granular texture, suggesting a material like granite or speckled marble. Hieroglyphic-like carvings are visible on the front of its rectangular base. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the details of each item.

instruction: Rotate the hand silhouette 90 degrees clockwise and put it in the top left panel.

image_metadata.short_caption: A ghostly silhouette of a hand presses against a frosted window pane, evoking an eerie and mysterious atmosphere.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a captivating and eerie composition dominated by the silhouette of a hand pressed against or seen through a translucent, possibly frosted or grimy, window pane. The overall color palette is muted, featuring shades of pale blue, cool grey, and dark charcoal, creating a somber and mysterious atmosphere. A prominent dark frame, likely a window sash, divides the image into four distinct, equally sized rectangular sections, forming a cross shape in the center. The hand, positioned in the bottom right pane, is a stark black silhouette with fingers slightly splayed and an extended thumb, conveying a sense of longing, desperation, or perhaps an attempt to make contact. The edges of the hand are slightly blurred, contributing to a spectral or ghostly effect, as if the light source is diffused or the hand itself is not entirely solid. The light filtering through the panes appears diffused and uneven, with subtle lighter patches and darker shadows within the frosted glass, suggesting variations in the material or ambient light conditions outside. There are also faint imperfections on the glass surface, such as subtle scratches or dust, adding to the realism of the texture. The top two panes and the bottom left pane show only the diffused light, reinforcing the focus on the solitary hand. The image evokes a sense of isolation, suspense, and the unknown, leaving the viewer to ponder the narrative behind the disembodied hand reaching out from the other side.

instruction: Remove the sticky note and the cassette tape behind it, replacing it with a depiction of the object mentioned on the sticky note.

image_metadata.short_caption: A grid display of four vintage audio cassette-related items, including clear, brown, and black-labeled cassettes, and a handwritten "BOOMBOX" insert, set against a clean white background.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a grid of four distinct objects, all related to audio cassette technology, arranged against a plain white background. In the top left, a transparent plastic audio cassette is shown, revealing its internal mechanisms, including the two spools with dark brown magnetic tape wound around them, and visible screws holding the casing together. To its right, in the top right quadrant, is another audio cassette with an off-white or light grey plastic casing and a dark brown label area. A white window displays a tape counter with the numbers "100", "50", and "0" faintly visible, while text on the brown label reads "LATO B" and "82021". The bottom left section features a piece of off-white paper, likely a cassette insert, with a handwritten word "BOOMBOX" in blue capital letters prominently displayed. A faint "25 B" is visible in the top left corner of the paper, and the paper is framed by an orange border, suggesting it is partially inside an orange cassette case or holder. Finally, in the bottom right, a third audio cassette is presented, featuring an off-white plastic casing with a large black label area. A white label on the black section reads "ORCHESTRA". To the left of the label, vertically oriented text indicates "LN C-60" and an "A" symbol with an arrow, signifying side A. A white window shows a tape counter with "100" and "50" visible, along with a right-pointing arrow. All objects are well-lit and appear to be part of a curated display or print, possibly showcasing the aesthetics of vintage audio media.

instruction: Show the scene depicted in the painting as if it were a real scene instead, looking through the arch.

image_metadata.short_caption: A vibrant garden mural, featuring a sundial and figures, is set within a rustic brick archway, fronted by a low black fence.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image captures a charming view through a weathered brick archway, revealing a vibrant painted mural within. The archway itself is constructed from reddish-brown bricks, showing signs of age with varying shades and some white residue or discoloration in the mortar joints, particularly at the base of the brick columns where hints of moss are visible. At the top of the arch, on either side, are dark metal hooks or brackets, one shaped like a decorative "T" on the right and a more ornate, possibly "J" or stylized shape on the left. To the immediate right of the archway, a vertical wooden lattice structure, weathered to a pale grey, extends from the top of the wall to the ground. The mural inside the archway depicts an idyllic garden scene under a partly cloudy sky. In the immediate foreground of the mural, there's a lush green lawn with a grey stone sundial on a pedestal to the left, and a band of purple and white flowers bordering the lawn. Further back in the mural, several figures, appearing to be women dressed in traditional or historical attire, are seated or standing on the grass near some bushes and trees. The background of the mural opens up to a wider landscape with more trees, distant hills, and what appears to be a gathering with white tents or structures, possibly a fair or event. In front of the mural, and outside the archway, is a low, black metal fence or railing with evenly spaced, U-shaped top bars, serving as a barrier. The ground in the immediate foreground is a dark, wet asphalt or concrete surface, showing puddles and varied textures. Towards the bottom right, a bright yellow and black cable protector lies on the ground, with a black cable emerging from it and disappearing towards the right. The overall impression is one of an artistic installation set within an old, possibly historic, outdoor space.

instruction: Make it so the frame is surrounding a black hole that is sucking in a clown. The clown is looking straight at the camera with a surprised and frightened look on its face and reaching a hand out of the frame.

image_metadata.short_caption: A vivid yellow wooden frame is mounted against a textured royal blue brick wall.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image features a prominent, vertically oriented rectangular wooden frame set against a vibrant blue brick wall. The frame is painted a dull, warm yellow or light ochre, creating a strong visual contrast with the intense, rich cerulean blue of the background. The wood of the frame shows signs of wear, with visible grain and minor blemishes, and is secured to the wall with screws or nails, particularly noticeable at the top corners. The brick wall behind the frame is uniformly painted, revealing the distinct texture of individual bricks and mortar lines. Scattered small dark holes or marks are visible on the blue brick surface, both inside and outside the frame, hinting at previous attachments or natural imperfections. The lighting is even and diffused, casting no harsh shadows and emphasizing the flat, graphic quality of the composition. The frame occupies a significant portion of the image, presenting a minimalist aesthetic that highlights color, texture, and geometric form.

instruction: Convert this Lego design into an oil on canvas painting with regular paint and brush strokes.

image_metadata.short_caption: A vibrant mosaic crafted from countless LEGO bricks depicts a warm-toned landscape featuring a blue sky, an expansive field, and a prominent dark brown feature resembling a tree or mountain on the left.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: This image presents a large, framed mosaic meticulously constructed from numerous small, individual LEGO bricks or tiles, forming a vibrant and pixelated landscape. The overall scene is dominated by warm, earthy tones, primarily oranges, yellows, and browns, with accents of other colors. The upper portion of the mosaic features a stretch of blue and light blue bricks, interspersed with some white and green, clearly depicting a sky, perhaps with clouds or distant foliage. Below the sky, the vast central area transitions into a rich tapestry of orange, yellow, tan, and brown bricks, suggesting a sun-drenched field, desert, or land mass. On the left side of the mosaic, a large, irregular mass of dark brown and black bricks extends from the bottom edge upwards, almost reaching the sky, resembling a tree trunk, a shadowed mountain, or a significant natural structure. The lower section of the mosaic, particularly towards the right and center, shows a more varied distribution of colors including greens, reds, blues, and various shades of brown and orange, indicating ground cover, sparse foliage, or perhaps a rough terrain. The individual studs of the LEGO bricks are visible, creating a textured, almost pointillist effect that coalesces into a coherent image when viewed from a distance. The entire artwork is contained within a dark, possibly black, frame, emphasizing its status as a constructed piece of art.

instruction: Make it so the man is riding a grizzly bear and is using a bow and arrow instead of a gun. Change CHATTERBOX to ARROWBEAR. Make the date eight years later and change Weekly to Monthly.

image_metadata.short_caption: This is a page from the "Chatterbox" magazine, issue No. 44, dated September 20, 1884, featuring a detailed black-and-white illustration of a man on horseback aiming a rifle during a hunt, accompanied by another rider and a dog, captioned "Sagacity and Stanchness."
image_metadata.detailed_caption: This image captures a well-preserved page from an antique magazine, identified as "Chatterbox." At the top, the publication details are clearly visible: "No. 44. Sept. 20, 1884." on the left, and "Weekly—One Halfpenny." on the right. The prominent title "Chatterbox." is set in a large, bold serif font beneath these details. The main feature of the page is a detailed black-and-white illustration, likely a wood engraving, depicting a hunting scene. A central figure, a man wearing a hat, is seated on a horse, actively aiming a long rifle towards the upper left. The horse, shown in profile, has a muscular build and a detailed bridle. Partially visible behind the first horse is a second man on horseback, also appearing to hold a rifle, suggesting another hunter. In the background, three birds are in flight to the left of the main hunter, and in the lower left corner of the illustration, a dog (possibly a pointer or setter) is crouched on the grassy ground, looking intently forward. The landscape is rendered with fine lines, showing grassy terrain and a distant horizon line. The illustration is signed "H. Weir" in a cursive style in the lower left corner and bears the caption "Sagacity and Stanchness." beneath it. The page itself exhibits signs of age, with a slightly yellowed hue, and is visibly bound into a larger volume, indicated by the visible spine and pages on the right side. The entire piece rests on a dark, wooden surface.

instruction: Without changing the painting style, show a massive 30-foot-tall ogre stumbling along in the street, holding its arms above its head to defend itself from a griffin that has its wings spread and its talons reaching for the ogre's head. The people on the street should be pressing themselves up against the wall and in shock and people in the foreground should be running away to the right.

image_metadata.short_caption: A vibrant 19th-century street scene depicting daily life and grand architecture in a historic European city under a bright sky.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image is a vertical painting depicting a bustling street scene in a historic urban setting, likely a European city from the 18th or 19th century. The composition uses a strong linear perspective, drawing the viewer's eye down the street into the background. On the left, a prominent multi-story building dominates the foreground with its pale facade, distinct turrets topped with crosses, and numerous windows. Its architectural style suggests a significant public or institutional building. Further down the street on the left, behind this building, a large, dark structure with a prominent bell tower and a domed roof, possibly a church or cathedral, rises above the surrounding smaller buildings, with a faint wisp of smoke emanating from its vicinity.

The right side of the street is lined with a more modest, darker-toned building, characterized by its red-tiled roofs and simpler windows. A dark streetlamp extends from this building into the street. The sky above is a mix of bright blue and fluffy white clouds, suggesting a clear day.

The street itself is animated by numerous figures engaged in various activities, creating a sense of lively daily life. In the immediate foreground, a complex scene unfolds: a person in a white garment kneels on the ground, seemingly interacting with an object or a person. Beside them, another figure, dressed in earth tones, kneels near a large, ornate piece of furniture, possibly a bed frame or headboard, suggesting a domestic or commercial activity. A reddish fabric is draped over part of this furniture. To the right, closer to the wall, two more figures are seated on the ground, one accompanied by a dog, and a smaller child-like figure nearby.

Further back on the left, a group of people is gathered, including a couple in an embrace, adding a touch of personal narrative to the public space. Various other individuals and groups are scattered throughout the middle ground, some appearing to push carts or carry items, contributing to the impression of a busy market or thoroughfare. The painting is rendered with visible brushstrokes, giving it a textural quality, and the lighting effectively conveys a bright, clear day, with soft shadows defining forms and depths. The overall impression is a vibrant snapshot of urban life, rich in anecdotal detail and architectural character.

instruction: Put a small version of King Edward's Crown and a royal blue robe on this tower raven. Also, fix that missing leg!

image_metadata.short_caption: A majestic raven, one of the Tower of London's iconic guardians, stands watch on a textured wooden beam with the blurred cityscape and historic walls in the background.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The photograph presents a sharp, close-up view of a large, glossy black raven perched on a textured, weathered wooden railing. The raven, the central subject, is captured in exquisite detail, showing the intricate patterns of its dark feathers, its strong, slightly curved beak, and a keen, dark eye. It stands upright, facing slightly to its right, conveying an impression of alertness and intelligence. A distinctive bright red band is clearly visible on its left leg, a common marker for the ravens of the Tower of London. The wooden railing itself exhibits deep grains and knots, indicating its age and exposure to the elements, bathed in what appears to be soft, natural light, possibly from an overcast sky. The background is rendered in a soft, atmospheric blur, creating a sense of depth. Immediately behind the bird, faint outlines of grey stone walls and arched structures, characteristic of the historic Tower of London, are discernible. Beyond these ancient elements, the hazy silhouettes of modern city buildings, including the distinctive curved form of what appears to be the Gherkin, rise against a muted, cloudy sky, subtly contrasting the historical foreground with contemporary urban development.

instruction: Make the letters of each word take on the aspect of the thing their word describes.

image_metadata.short_caption: Engraved words "BLAZE BEARD" are deeply carved into a textured pink and black speckled granite surface, showcasing intricate detail and material contrast.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image provides a very close-up and detailed view of two words, "BLAZE" and "BEARD," meticulously carved into a granular granite surface. The granite itself is a complex tapestry of colors, primarily a warm, speckled pink or peach, liberally interspersed with dark, irregular black mineral inclusions and translucent, light grey to off-white crystalline grains. The surface of the stone appears textured, revealing the rough, crystalline nature of the granite, with some areas exhibiting a subtle sheen. The letters are deeply incised into the stone, creating well-defined, recessed channels that appear distinctly lighter in color than the surrounding uncarved granite. This lighter hue within the carving contrasts sharply with the darker, mottled background of the stone, emphasizing the crisp edges of each letter. Within these carved depressions, the inherent rough texture and varied mineral composition of the granite are clearly visible, with individual grains and small, dark specks within the light channels. The word "BLAZE" occupies the upper portion of the frame, followed directly below by "BEARD," both rendered in a clear, blocky serif font. The precision of the carving is evident, with sharp corners and straight lines forming the characters. The overall effect is a striking interplay between the natural beauty and complexity of the stone and the deliberate human artistry of the inscription.

instruction: The mug is obscuring a view of the skyline of downtown Manhattan looking south from a tall building in Chelsea. On the cup itself, add an outline of the skyline that you would see if the cup weren't there.

image_metadata.short_caption: A hand holds a white coffee mug in sharp focus against a blurred backdrop of a city skyline under a bright blue sky.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a first-person perspective, focusing intently on a hand holding a white ceramic mug against a grand, yet blurred, urban landscape. The mug and the hand gripping its handle are rendered in sharp focus, occupying the central portion of the frame. The mug itself is a plain, white design, with a few subtle, light-brown smudges or stains visible on its upper rim, suggesting recent use. The fingers are naturally curled around the mug's handle, and a segment of a dark blue, ribbed sweater sleeve is visible on the lower left, extending from the wrist. The background, deliberately out of focus to create a shallow depth of field, reveals a sprawling city skyline beneath a vivid blue sky adorned with scattered, fluffy white clouds. On the left side of the blurred background, a tall, dark-colored building with numerous visible windows, possibly of an older architectural style, stands prominently. Towards the right, a denser collection of buildings of varying heights and tones stretches into the distance, with distinct, slender skyscrapers visible on the far horizon, suggesting a major metropolitan area. The high vantage point from which the photograph was taken indicates the viewer is positioned high above the city, perhaps in a high-rise apartment or office. The bright, natural daylight illuminates the entire scene evenly, creating a clear and serene atmosphere. The overall impression conveyed is one of calm and relaxation, enjoying a beverage while overlooking a bustling cityscape.

instruction: Put another man just like this one sitting on the bench on the right and have both men looking directly at each other. Make the two dogs look at each other too.

image_metadata.short_caption: A classical painting depicts a reclining figure, possibly a hunter, with a sighthound by a stream in a dark forest.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: This evocative classical painting presents a recumbent figure, likely male and perhaps a hunter or a mythological character such as Adonis or Endymion, resting by a reflective body of water within a dense, verdant forest. The central individual is depicted lounging on a stone or earthen bank, adorned in flowing drapery of a light, possibly golden hue, complemented by a vibrant crimson cloak draped over their lower body and arms. Their left arm is dynamically raised, holding what appears to be a bowstring, suggesting a break from the hunt. The figure's head is bowed and eyes downcast, imparting an expression of contemplative repose or perhaps weary contemplation. Their right hand rests gently on the bank beside a bundle of arrows, further reinforcing the hunting motif. Adjacent to the figure, a graceful, cream-colored sighthound, characteristic of a greyhound, stands alertly on the bank, its gaze directed towards the left of the composition. The dog's loyal presence underscores the theme of companionship or a hunting expedition. Partially visible behind the lead dog is what appears to be the body of a second hound or part of the first's hindquarters. The background is enveloped in deep, shadowy green foliage, evoking the depth of a primeval forest or grotto. To the far right, a robust tree trunk is adorned with delicate clusters of white blossoms or berries, adding a touch of natural beauty. The immediate foreground is dominated by the dark, still water, subtly mirroring the somber hues of the surroundings. The painting exhibits rich chiaroscuro, with a focused light source illuminating the figures, making them emerge from the subdued, atmospheric backdrop. The visible brushwork, the dramatic pose, and the opulent color palette of reds, golds, and deep greens are characteristic of an Old Master painting, possibly from the Baroque period, imbuing the scene with a sense of narrative and timeless elegance.

instruction: Change "NECK" to say "BACK" and change "FACE" to "PROP" instead, ensuring the lines of the running paint fit the shapes of the changed letters.

image_metadata.short_caption: Silver graffiti spelling "NECKFACE" stands out on a dark, worn wall above a textured diamond plate floor, capturing an raw urban scene.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image captures a striking piece of graffiti in silver or light gray paint, prominently displaying the word "NECKFACE" across a dark, worn background. The text is rendered in a distinct, stylized hand, characteristic of street art or tagging, with visible drips of paint extending downwards from several letters, particularly the 'N', 'K', and 'E' in "NECKFACE", adding to its raw, spontaneous feel. The background surface is a matte black, appearing somewhat weathered and uneven, with numerous small, irregular specks and chips of lighter material showing through, suggesting an aged or frequently used wall. The silver paint stands out sharply against this dark backdrop. Below the graffiti and the dark wall, the lower portion of the image reveals a rugged, dark gray or brown diamond plate metal surface, likely a pavement or floor, which shows signs of wear, dirt, and some minor reflections, indicating a textured, industrial environment. A small, dark, vertical metal piece protrudes from the seam between two sections of the diamond plate in the lower-middle, hinting at utilitarian infrastructure. The lighting appears somewhat dim but sufficient to highlight the reflective qualities of the silver paint and the metallic texture of the foreground, suggesting an urban setting, possibly at night or in an enclosed, shadowed area. The overall aesthetic is one of urban grit and rebellious expression.

instruction: Change the expression to say "PRINCE CASTLE" instead.

image_metadata.short_caption: A semi-transparent, textured banner displays the mirrored words "FAMILY" and "MUSEUM" in white, viewed from behind, with a blurry outdoor scene featuring buildings, trees, and cars visible through the material.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a visually intriguing composition featuring large, mirrored white text superimposed over a semi-transparent, textured background. The primary text, prominently displayed across the upper half of the frame, reads "YLIMAF", which is the word "FAMILY" rendered backward and flipped horizontally. Below it, on the lower half, is the word "MUE2UM", representing "MUSEUM" similarly mirrored. These bold, sans-serif letters are set against a backdrop of a warm, muted purplish-red hue, which itself has a distinct horizontal striped or mesh pattern, suggesting the text is printed on a large, perforated banner or screen. Through this transparent material, a blurry outdoor scene is visible. The background reveals architectural structures, likely buildings with multiple windows and classical elements, flanked by numerous green trees. A paved area or road with the faint outlines of cars can also be discerned, all rendered in soft focus. The texture of the banner is evident, with fine horizontal lines running across the entire image, and there are visible cracks, creases, or imperfections traversing the surface, adding to its tactile quality. The overall impression is one of looking through an artistic or informational display from the reverse side, offering a unique perspective on the signage and its environment.

instruction: Turn this into a photorealistic scene with the men and dog in this room as real life versions. The paintings themselves should still appear as paintings, of course.

image_metadata.short_caption: A 17th-century painting portrays two men, one in a red cape, examining various artworks displayed in what appears to be an art gallery or collector's study, with a small dog observing them.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image is a detailed painting, likely from the 17th century, depicting a scene within an art gallery, a collector's cabinet, or an art dealer's establishment. The composition centers on two male figures engaged in an interaction amidst a profusion of artworks. The dominant color scheme consists of rich browns, warm ochres, and deep reds, with subtle highlights. To the left, with his back mostly to the viewer, stands a man clad in a striking, voluminous red cape and a dark, wide-brimmed hat. His gaze is directed towards the right, seemingly at the objects of interest. Facing him, slightly to the right of the canvas's center, is another gentleman, perhaps an art dealer or collector, who gestures with his right hand towards a large, framed painting. He wears a dark coat, a white ruffled cravat, and a dark hat, his profile turned slightly towards the viewer, revealing a focused expression.

The background and foreground are filled with various artworks, emphasizing the painting's theme of art appreciation or commerce. A prominent, large, dark-framed painting forms a central focal point to the right of the figures. This inner painting depicts a classical or allegorical scene with a draped figure in a pink or red gown, accompanied by two older, robed male figures and a child, rendered in warm tones. Below this central piece, several other framed paintings are casually displayed. One depicts a landscape or seascape, while two smaller portraits are propped against each other in the bottom right corner; one shows an older man with a dark beard, and the other, a portly individual in a red tunic. A small, brown and white spotted dog stands attentively on the brown floor in the mid-ground, positioned between the two men and the main art display. To the left, the scene recedes into a darker, less defined area, where faint suggestions of other figures or objects can be discerned, hinting at a wider, perhaps bustling, interior space. The upper background features architectural elements, including dark, decorative panels with carved motifs and hints of arched structures, further setting the context of a sophisticated interior. The overall impression is one of a moment of contemplation or transaction, steeped in the cultural richness of the era's art world.

instruction: Make the white squares in the top row orange, change the black squares in the bottom row to be yellow. Write a white pi symbol in the top middle square.

image_metadata.short_caption: A close-up, top-down view of a worn and grimy black and white checkerboard pattern, revealing intricate textures and debris on a painted concrete surface.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image displays a high-resolution, top-down view of a heavily weathered and textured black and white checkerboard pattern, likely painted directly onto a concrete or asphalt surface. The composition reveals six distinct squares arranged in a 2x3 grid, alternating between light and dark tones. Both the white and black segments are rich in tactile detail, suggesting significant age and exposure to the elements.

The white squares, which appear as a faded, off-white or light gray, are marred by numerous tiny dark specks, dirt accumulation, and fine, irregular cracks that spiderweb across their surfaces, particularly noticeable in the top left square. This square also clearly shows a small, curved black piece of debris. The top right white square features a delicate, wispy, multi-branched fiber, resembling a dried plant filament or a fragment of organic matter. The paint on these lighter sections appears thin and worn, revealing the coarse texture of the underlying material.

The black squares, while maintaining their dark hue, are equally textured and worn. They are speckled with countless small, light-colored flecks, likely chipped paint or dust, creating a mottled appearance. The bottom left black square contains a faint, almost ghostly circular imprint or stain, along with several thin, irregular lines that resemble fine scratches or natural striations in the surface. Both black squares also show subtle variations in sheen and are dotted with smaller pieces of debris, including what appears to be tiny twigs or plant fragments. The overall impression is one of a utilitarian surface, perhaps a well-trodden pathway or an industrial floor, where the paint has endured considerable traffic and environmental impact, leaving behind a rich tapestry of dirt, cracks, and remnants of daily life.

instruction: Reorder the words so that they appear alphabetically from top to bottom, while ensuring the reflections don't change.

image_metadata.short_caption: Six black signs with white text categorize food and drink items like Breakfast, Coffee, Sandwiches, Salads, Pastries, and Beverages, displayed against a reflective, abstract background.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a visually organized display of six vertically stacked rectangular signs, each featuring a category written in bold, white, sans-serif capital letters against a solid black background. From top to bottom, the signs read "BREAKFAST," "COFFEE," "SANDWICHES," "SALADS," "PASTRIES," and "BEVERAGES." The signs appear to be made of a smooth, possibly acrylic or metallic material, exhibiting slight reflectivity, particularly noticeable as a blurred reflection on the "SANDWICHES" sign and more distorted reflections on the lower "PASTRIES" and "BEVERAGES" signs, which seem to capture elements of the surroundings or perhaps even the photographer. The background behind the signs is an abstract, wavy, and highly reflective surface that transitions in color from a bright, almost metallic silver-white at the top to a more muted gray in the middle, then introducing striking streaks of blue and green towards the bottom, suggesting artistic lighting or a decorative wall panel. The overall impression is one of a clean, modern, and well-organized food service area, such as a cafeteria, deli, or buffet line.

instruction: Rotate the central square image of the bear 180 degrees so it is upside down, and then move the all of the other eight small image squares one square clockwise around that central one.

image_metadata.short_caption: A white ceramic mug with a blue handle and interior, featuring a 3x3 grid of nine distinct images including a cartoon T-Rex, a graffiti robot, a panda, a blueprint, a dog with a chalkboard, sports balls, a gingerbread man, an ostrich in a hat, and a cartoon bear.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image showcases a white ceramic mug with a contrasting vibrant blue handle and interior, resting on a light-colored, possibly wooden, surface against a plain white background. The exterior surface of the mug is entirely covered by a collage of nine distinct images, meticulously arranged in a 3x3 grid format.

Starting from the top left corner and moving clockwise:
The first square displays a green, cartoon-style Tyrannosaurus Rex, depicted with a small red backpack strapped to its back, set against a light blue sky with white clouds.
Adjacent to it, the top middle square features a dark, stylized robot or creature spray-painted onto a textured wall, resembling blue and grey graffiti art.
The top right image captures a black and white panda holding a bright orange, round object, possibly a piece of fruit or a toy.
Moving to the middle right, there is a detailed technical drawing or blueprint, showcasing the design of what appears to be an aircraft or a missile, with some text and measurements partially visible.
The bottom right square presents a light brown dog wearing spectacles and a red bandana, sitting beside a green chalkboard covered in various handwritten mathematical equations and numerical calculations.
In the bottom middle, a brown American football is positioned horizontally between two bright yellow tennis balls, all resting on a uniform grey surface.
The bottom left corner features a simple, light brown outline of a gingerbread man with a smiling face.
The middle left image depicts an ostrich wearing a black fedora hat, with a dark pipe having a blue tip protruding from its beak.
Finally, the central square of the grid is a cartoon illustration of a friendly brown bear, adorned with a light brown hat and a prominent red bow tie around its neck.

The collection of images on the mug is highly diverse, ranging from realistic animals and sports equipment to cartoon characters, technical drawings, and graffiti, suggesting an eclectic mix of themes and interests.

instruction: Turn this into a high quality anime cartoon drawing that captures the details of all stuffed animals attached to the car.

image_metadata.short_caption: A tan SUV is extravagantly decorated with a multitude of stuffed animals covering nearly every exterior surface, creating a unique and whimsical display on wheels.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents the side profile of a tan or champagne-colored Honda CR-V SUV, parked on what appears to be an asphalt street or parking lot. The most distinctive feature of the vehicle is its extensive covering of various stuffed animals and plush toys, which are attached to almost every exterior surface. On the front hood, a red Spider-Man plush is prominently displayed alongside other smaller animal figures. The roof is adorned with several plush creatures, including a large brown dog-like figure. The side doors are heavily decorated with a diverse collection of stuffed animals, such as a white teddy bear, a black and white panda, various dog breeds, a pink pig, and several colorful, rounded plush toys resembling Squishmallows on the windows. Even the wheel wells and bumpers feature attached plushies, including a multi-colored creature near the front wheel, a brown and white figure near the rear wheel, a yellow fish, and a large cluster of grey and white stuffed animals dangling from the rear bumper. In the background, urban elements are visible, including a large dark dumpster covered in white graffiti, a utility pole, and distant commercial or industrial buildings with grey concrete walls and red accents, topped with HVAC units and a satellite dish. The sky is a soft, muted light, suggesting either dawn or dusk. The overall impression is that of a highly personalized and unconventional vehicle, serving as a unique and whimsical display.

instruction: Move the red dial to the number that is double the number it currently points to.

image_metadata.short_caption: A close-up view of a vintage Emerson radio dial and control knobs, featuring frequency markings and brand details against a metallic speaker grille.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image captures a close-up, top-down view of the dial and control knobs of a vintage Emerson radio, set against a perforated metallic grille. The central focus is the large, circular dial, which features a dark brown or black face with white numerical markings for radio frequencies, specifically 55, 60, 70, 80, 90, 110, 130, and 160, likely representing kilohertz for AM broadcasting. Smaller white dots are interspersed between the larger numerical markers, serving as finer tuning indicators. A slender, reddish-orange needle points to a frequency slightly above 80. The dial's center is adorned with a light beige or cream-colored ring surrounding a clear, reflective glass or plastic element. Along the lower curve of the dial, the brand name "EMERSON RADIO" is prominently displayed in a stylized font, with the full corporate name "AND PHONOGRAPH CORPORATION N.Y. U.S.A." inscribed in smaller text beneath it. Below the main dial, two dark brown, fluted control knobs with concave centers are visible, positioned to the left and right, suggesting volume and tuning controls. The entire surface beneath the dial and knobs is a light beige or gold-colored metallic mesh, typical of a speaker grille from an older radio model. The overall aesthetic evokes a strong sense of nostalgia and mid-20th-century design.

instruction: Oops, someone mislabeled things! Remove that sticky note and add six blue sticky notes with the word "FACE" written on each, placing them over each of the visible faces in the image.

image_metadata.short_caption: A yellow Post-it note with "HAND" written on it is prominently displayed over a complex black and white pattern of vintage-style drawn female faces.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a vibrant yellow Post-it note centrally placed against a repeating pattern of black and white illustrations of women's faces. The Post-it note, which appears slightly creased and stands out against the monochrome background, has the word "HAND" handwritten in bold, dark green capital letters. Its placement creates a soft shadow underneath it, suggesting it is affixed to a surface. The background pattern consists of numerous detailed portraits of women, rendered in a classic, possibly vintage or Art Nouveau-inspired, illustrative style with intricate line work. Each face features distinct expressions and elaborate hairstyles, characterized by voluminous curls and waves. While most of the faces are depicted in black and white with white negative space for skin, one woman in the lower right portion of the image subtly stands out with her lips colored in a deep red, adding a singular pop of color to the otherwise monochromatic background. The illustrations are tightly packed, with faces overlapping and interweaving, creating a sense of density. The overall impression is a blend of modern simplicity (the Post-it) with classic artistic detail (the illustrations), creating an intriguing visual contrast.

instruction: Make this poster about a missing bear by changing both the words and the image of the animal.

image_metadata.short_caption: A sun-drenched "Missing Cat - Nyx" poster, describing a black cat with a white patch and a stub tail, is prominently displayed outdoors.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a close-up, slightly angled view of a "Missing cat - Nyx" poster, likely affixed outdoors to a pole or fence. The poster appears to be protected by a clear plastic sleeve or lamination, which strongly reflects bright sunlight from the upper left, creating a prominent lens flare and a soft, hazy glow across the upper and left parts of the frame. Despite the glare, the text on the poster is mostly clear and legible. At the top, the title "Missing cat - Nyx" is visible. Below the title, a photograph shows a black cat with a patch of white fur on one side, appearing to be resting on a light-colored wooden surface. Further down, a descriptive text box reads: "Black cat with a patch of white on one side and no tail, just a little stub. She is friendly if a little nervous." The background behind the poster is heavily obscured by the bright light, showing only faint suggestions of a blue sky and distant foliage, indicative of a clear, sunny day. The overall impression is a poignant public appeal for a lost pet, captured amidst striking natural light.

instruction: Change the bust to instead be that of the Mona Lisa -- as a monochromatic sculpture and not as a painting.

image_metadata.short_caption: A classical bust of a Roman emperor stands prominently, casting shadows on a light wall, with its reflection visible in a red-framed mirror, surrounded by an eclectic collection of artifacts including patterned staffs, a skull, shells, and a decorative bowl.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image presents an intricately composed indoor scene, likely a curated display within a room or gallery, featuring a prominent bust and its reflection. The focal point is a finely sculpted white bust, appearing to be crafted from marble or plaster, depicting a classical figure, most likely a Roman emperor such as Augustus, recognizable by the distinct short, layered hairstyle and strong profile. The bust faces towards the right, with its head slightly turned, capturing a dignified and thoughtful expression. It rests on a wooden surface, which also holds several decorative objects: a small, dark red, spiky plant-like adornment, a light-colored conch shell, and a blue and white patterned ceramic bowl, suggesting a collection of artifacts.

To the left of the main bust, a striking red-framed cabinet door or mirror provides a reflection of the bust itself, albeit appearing somewhat darker and less defined than the original. This reflection also reveals other elements within the cabinet, including what appears to be another white sculptural piece or draped fabric, adding depth and visual interest to the composition. The vibrant red of the frame contrasts sharply with the light, neutral tones of the wall and bust.

The background wall is a plain, light cream or off-white color, against which the shadows cast by the bust and other vertical objects are clearly visible, indicating a light source coming from the left side of the frame. Further to the left, leaning against this wall, are two tall, slender wooden poles or staffs. One of these features intricate, dark geometric patterns, suggesting a tribal or ceremonial origin. Above these staffs, a part of what looks like an animal skull or bone is mounted on the wall, adding to the eclectic and possibly anthropological theme of the display. The overall ambiance suggests a space dedicated to the appreciation of art, history, and natural artifacts, meticulously arranged for aesthetic appeal.

instruction: Put the one "DRINK" card on the left, in the middle, and put the three "TOAST" cards on the right, lined up vertically, but make the middle one flipped so it reads upside down.

image_metadata.short_caption: A chalkboard displays "PAY IT FORWARD" with notes for pre-paid "DRINK" and "TOAST" items, indicating a community giving system.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a dark, textured surface, strongly resembling a chalkboard, with white chalk lettering at the top that reads "PAY IT FORWARD" in two lines. The words are written in a clear, sans-serif, uppercase font, with "PAY IT" on the first line and "FORWARDS" on the second. Below this heading, several rectangular paper notes are affixed to the chalkboard. One note, colored white, is positioned slightly above the center and is angled diagonally with the top left corner higher than the bottom right. Written on this white note in black, hand-drawn uppercase letters is the word "DRINK." Surrounding the white note are three yellow rectangular notes. One yellow note is on the left side, slightly below the "DRINK" note, and it reads "TOAST" in black uppercase letters. Another yellow note is in the upper right quadrant, also reading "TOAST." The third yellow note is in the lower right corner, likewise displaying "TOAST." The notes appear to be stuck to the surface, possibly with tape or adhesive, and have a slightly worn or used appearance. The overall impression is of a system in a café or similar establishment where customers can contribute to a "pay it forward" scheme, allowing others to claim a pre-paid drink or toast. The chalkboard itself shows subtle signs of use, with some light marks and variations in its dark tone, suggesting an active, interactive display.

instruction: Change the direction that the truck is facing, and put a moose next to it looking directly at the backup camera.

image_metadata.short_caption: A clear view of a modern car's infotainment screen displaying a detailed backup camera feed, showing a red vintage truck, a cabin, and mountains in a scenic outdoor setting, surrounded by the vehicle's functional dashboard controls.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image captures the interior of a modern vehicle, specifically focusing on the large, central infotainment screen displaying a vibrant rearview camera feed. The screen itself is framed by glossy black plastic, seamlessly integrated into the car's dashboard. Above the screen, a row of tactile buttons is visible, featuring various vehicle control icons such as "A OFF" (likely for auto start/stop), an alert triangle, and "P))) OFF" (suggesting parking assist sensors). The backup camera view shows a gravel or paved path extending away from the vehicle, clearly marked with dynamic green and static yellow guide lines, culminating in red warning indicators at their ends. Dashed white lines further delineate the center of the path. To the right in the camera's view, a vintage red pickup truck, possibly a Chevrolet, is prominently parked next to what appears to be a rustic wooden cabin. On the left side of the path, a stone-patterned walkway and a wooden fence lead towards other parked vehicles and more distant structures nestled among trees. In the background, lush green mountains rise under a bright sky, suggesting an outdoor, possibly rural or mountainous setting. Below the main screen, physical controls for the car's climate and audio systems are visible, including a "MUTE" button, a "VOL" (volume) knob with a power icon, and controls for heated seats, fan speed, and "A/C OFF." Another knob labeled "TUNE ENTER" is also present on the right. The dashboard material around the screen appears to be a dark, possibly leather or soft-touch material with visible stitching, indicative of a premium vehicle interior.

instruction: Turn this painting of the woman on the boat into a photorealistic rendition of the scene, as though one had taken a picture with a high quality camera, with all the same items and elements as they are in the painting, and depicting the same time of day.

image_metadata.short_caption: A captivating painting depicts a long-haired woman in a richly adorned boat on a tranquil river, surrounded by lush reeds and dark woods, her expression contemplative as she holds a delicate chain, evoking a serene and melancholic narrative.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image presents a captivating oil painting, strongly reminiscent of the Pre-Raphaelite style, portraying a young woman alone in an ornate boat on a tranquil body of water. The central figure possesses long, flowing reddish-auburn hair, adorned with a simple band across her forehead. She is dressed in a white gown with bell sleeves, accented with intricate gold embroidery along the cuffs and a dark sash cinching her waist. Her head is tilted slightly upwards, and her gaze is directed towards the upper right, conveying an expression that seems to be a blend of contemplation, yearning, or perhaps quiet resignation.

The boat itself is dark and sleek, featuring a striking, golden, spiraled prow that adds an element of ancient or mythical grandeur. Towards the front of the boat, several tall, slender white candles stand upright, casting a subtle illumination. The woman is seated amidst a rich display of textiles; a magnificent, large tapestry or blanket, adorned with what appear to be medieval or mythological scenes in rich hues of red, gold, and blue, drapes over the side of the boat and into the water. Near her left hand, a delicate, dark chain or rosary is loosely held.

The boat is enveloped by dense green reeds and aquatic foliage, particularly prominent in the foreground and on the left, where two small, black and white birds, resembling magpies, are either perched or in flight. The water surface is still, reflecting the soft light and surrounding vegetation. In the background, a dense canopy of dark, tall trees creates a verdant backdrop, suggesting a thick forest. Beyond the immediate treeline, the landscape opens up to show distant rolling hills under a soft, muted sky, hinting at either dawn or dusk with its diffused light. The overall mood of the painting is deeply evocative and mysterious, imbued with a sense of narrative and a subtle undercurrent of melancholy or a journey's end.

instruction: Turn these elements into two comic book panels placed side by side: the woman and man on the left are in a panel on the left, with a word box reading "They started the rhythm...", then make a second panel based on the man on the right with the word box reading "... and he couldn't resist its pull." Make sure the visuals are in a modern comic book style but keep the form of these sketches and use their color scheme.

image_metadata.short_caption: An expressive oil painting depicts three figures, possibly flamenco performers, captured in dynamic poses of clapping, singing, and movement, highlighting their passionate engagement in the music and dance.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
This is an expressive oil painting on canvas depicting three figures, likely musicians and dancers engaged in a performance, strongly evocative of a flamenco setting. The background is a plain, neutral beige or raw canvas, allowing the figures to stand out with their distinct poses and attire.

On the left, a woman is seated, leaning forward intensely. She wears a vibrant red top or shawl with flowing lines and a full white skirt, both rendered with thick, visible brushstrokes (impasto), particularly in the skirt. Her hands are raised, appearing to be in a clapping motion (palmas), and her face, though loosely rendered, suggests an upward gaze and deep concentration. Dark hair frames her face. Behind her, a dark, broad brushstroke suggests a shadow or a stage element.

In the center, a male figure is depicted in a much more gestural and less finished manner, appearing almost like an underpainting study. He wears a dark hat and a dark suit, with his hands also raised, possibly clapping or holding an instrument. His facial features are minimally suggested, with a hint of a mustache. This figure's lower body is barely defined, emphasizing movement and form over detailed rendering.

To the right, a second man is seated, leaning back slightly with his head tilted upward and eyes appearing closed or looking into the distance, conveying deep emotional immersion. He wears a dark jacket, a white shirt, and black trousers, cinched with a broad red sash or belt. His hands rest on his lap, one seemingly holding a small red object. He also wears a dark, wide-brimmed hat. The chair he sits on is minimally suggested by a brushstroke of golden yellow. The brushwork on this figure is more developed than the central one, but still loose and expressive, focusing on capturing the mood and posture.

The overall style is spontaneous and dynamic, with visible brushstrokes and a limited but striking color palette of reds, whites, blacks, and natural tones. The painting captures a moment of passionate performance, emphasizing the energy, rhythm, and emotion of the subjects rather than photographic realism.

instruction: Read the expression on the sticky note. Write one unique word from the expression on each of the six dogs surrounding it, in clockwise fashion. Remove the sticky note and complete the drawing of the dog it is occluding.

image_metadata.short_caption: A wall adorned with stylized tan and black illustrations of various dog breeds, featuring a green sticky note that reads, "Dogs are our link to paradise."
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image presents a flat surface, likely a wall covered in wallpaper or a large print, featuring numerous stylized illustrations of various dog breeds. The background is a clean, light off-white or cream color, serving as a neutral backdrop for the canine designs. The dogs themselves are rendered in a graphic, minimalist style, primarily using two colors: a medium, warm tan or beige, and black for outlines, markings, or solid forms.

Various breeds are identifiable: a tan Labrador-like dog is prominent on the left, facing right, with simple features. Above it, a smaller tan dog resembles a Scottish Terrier. In the upper middle, a shaggy tan and black Old English Sheepdog-like figure is depicted, while to its right, a tan terrier with black markings and a collar stands. On the far right, a long-haired dog, possibly a Collie, is outlined in black, showcasing its flowing fur. Below it, a tan and white Bulldog with a distinctive underbite and tongue sticking out is illustrated. Towards the bottom left, a black and tan dog, possibly a Border Collie, is shown with its tongue extended, and a part of a tan and black Poodle is visible beside it. Other dog shapes and outlines, some in solid tan and others merely sketched in black lines, are scattered across the composition, creating a playful and busy pattern.

A bright green square sticky note is centrally placed, slightly obscuring some of the dog illustrations. Handwritten in a neat, dark script on the note is the heartwarming phrase: "Dogs are our link to paradise." The lighting on the surface is even and bright, clearly illuminating all the details of the illustrations and the text on the note. The overall impression is one of warmth, affection for dogs, and a charming aesthetic.

instruction: Extract the black-and-white figure as a rendered 3D figure standing in a living room in a computer game, and give him a mini-me version that looks just like him but is half his height and looking up at him.

image_metadata.short_caption: A layered urban graffiti artwork featuring a wide-eyed, stitched-mouth character in black and white against a vibrant red wall, overlaid with blue stripes, tags, and stickers.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image presents a dynamic and textured piece of street art, primarily focused on a central, stylized character painted in black and white on what appears to be a worn, red wall. The character has a large, rounded head with two prominent, hollow black circles for eyes, each containing a smaller white dot, lending a wide-eyed or vacant expression. Its mouth is a stark horizontal black line with several short, vertical dashes beneath it, creating a stitched or grimacing effect. The body is a simple, pear-shaped form, also in white, with two stubby, black arm-like appendages extending from its sides. The white paint, possibly silver, reflects light, giving it a subtle sheen, and is covered with various scribbles and tags in black, faint yellow, and subtle red, such as "NELL" on the upper left and "SHU" and "ASC" near the character's lower left side.

The background is a vibrant, textured red wall, exhibiting signs of wear with flaking paint that reveals darker layers beneath. A bold, curving vertical stripe of bright blue paint cuts across the left side of the frame, partially obscuring the character and the red background. The right side of the red wall is also adorned with multiple layers of graffiti, including a prominent, wavy tag in turquoise-green, and fainter purple or blue tags. In the upper right corner, a small sticker with a black skull and the text "Who is Big Sauce?" is visible, along with another faded stick-figure drawing below it. The image is brightly lit, likely by a direct flash, which highlights the rough textures of the wall and the layered nature of the graffiti, contributing to an authentic urban aesthetic.

instruction: Rewrite all instances of the word "incense" to "tennis" and change all the stars to tennis balls.

image_metadata.short_caption: A retail display featuring a blue sign that reads "Incense" above a decorative black banner adorned with white stars, artistic swirls, and the word "INCENSE" written in gold and white script.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image presents a close-up view of a retail or display area dedicated to "Incense." At the top, a rectangular blue sign with a subtle grey border at its base prominently displays the word "Incense" in clean, white sans-serif capital letters. This sign rests on a light-colored wooden shelf, which spans horizontally across the frame. The wall behind the shelf and sign is a plain, light, warm beige or light pink color. Metallic decorative corner pieces are affixed to the upper left and right corners of the blue sign, adding a small detail of ornamentation. Below the wooden shelf, a black, somewhat textured banner or backdrop is visible, appearing to be made of paper or a similar material. This black surface is embellished with numerous white and silvery outlined stars and circular dots of various sizes, creating a celestial or magical motif. The focal point of the banner is the word "INCENSE," written in large, ornate letters. The letters are filled with a shimmering golden color and outlined in thick white paint, giving them a raised, decorative appearance. Flowing white and black/silver glittery swirls extend from and around the golden "INCENSE" text, particularly below it, enhancing the whimsical and mystical aesthetic. A portion of a brown and gold stylized object, possibly a leaf or petal, is partially visible in the bottom-left corner of the frame. The lighting in the scene is bright and even, illuminating all elements clearly and highlighting the artistic details of the display.

instruction: Swap the cards for "run" and "need", "play" and "school" and "hibernate" and "question".

image_metadata.short_caption: A humorous cardboard sign display on a pegboard reads "I need to HIBERNATE at School," flanked by words like "run," "play," "question," and "collaborate," capturing a relatable student sentiment.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image displays a creative and humorous visual arrangement of handwritten words on cut-out cardboard pieces, set against a grey pegboard background. The pegboard, visible behind and around the cardboard, is perforated with a regular grid of small, circular holes. The cardboard pieces, varying slightly in size and shape, show signs of wear such as slightly frayed edges and visible creases, suggesting they are repurposed materials. All words are written in black marker, exhibiting a clear, blocky, and somewhat informal handwritten style.

The central and most prominent part of the display forms a horizontal line reading "I need to HIBERNATE at School." The word "I" is on a smaller, vertical piece, followed by "need" and "to" on two separate horizontal pieces. The "need" piece notably features several small, raised dots, indicative of Braille text. The word "HIBERNATE" occupies a larger, central rectangular piece, with "at" and "School" completing the phrase on smaller pieces to its right.

Extending vertically from the central "HIBERNATE" piece, the display forms a cross-like shape. Above "HIBERNATE," two rectangular cardboard pieces are stacked vertically: the top one reads "run," and the one directly below it says "play." Similarly, below "HIBERNATE," two more horizontal cardboard pieces are stacked: the upper one reads "question," and the bottom one clearly states "Collaborate." The entire composition visually encapsulates a student's relatable feelings about school life, combining a desire for rest ("HIBERNATE") with common school activities ("run," "play," "question," "collaborate"), presented with a sense of wit and resourcefulness.

instruction: Let's switch out the cat and make this poster about a missing yeti. Replace all written instances of "cat" with "yeti" and change "meows" to "howls". Then, change the picture so that it shows a cute yeti in the same pose as the cat and otherwise conforming to the description on the poster.

image_metadata.short_caption: A wet "MISSING CAT" poster featuring a grey tabby cat named Zena, with a description of her unique features, is shown affixed to an outdoor pole.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: This close-up, eye-level photograph captures a laminated "MISSING CAT" poster affixed to a dark, possibly wooden or metal, pole outdoors. The poster, predominantly white, is visibly wet with numerous water droplets clinging to its surface, suggesting recent rain or exposure to moisture. At the top, the bold black text "MISSING CAT" is prominently displayed. Below this, a large, centered image features a grey tabby cat with distinct black stripes. The cat appears to be resting comfortably on a soft, light brown, textured blanket. Its head is slightly tilted, and it looks directly at the viewer with bright, observant eyes. Below the cat's photo, there is printed text. The first line reads, "Hey! My name is M___ and my cat Zena has gone missing." The first part of the owner's name is partially obscured. The subsequent lines provide a description of the missing feline: "She is a gray tabby cat with black stripes, she is very small and (usually) meows a lot. Her left eyes is half black so she is very recognizable." The very bottom of the poster shows the partial word "Pla", likely part of "Please" or "Place". The background is softly blurred, showing green foliage on the left and right, with hints of urban structures or buildings in the distance, out of focus. The lighting appears natural, suggesting an overcast or diffused daylight setting.

instruction: Zoom out and pan to the right to reveal a massive eland lowering its head to challenge the lion.

image_metadata.short_caption: A detailed museum diorama showcases a majestic male lion standing in a sun-drenched, arid desert landscape with rocks, dry foliage, and distant mountains under a clear sky.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: This is a vivid, full-shot image of what appears to be a male lion in a natural history museum diorama, posed in an arid, rocky desert landscape. The lion, which is likely taxidermied, stands majestically with its body turned slightly towards the left of the frame, while its head is sharply turned to the right, mouth slightly agape as if roaring or panting. Its fur is a rich tan and light brown, with a prominent, full golden-brown mane framing its head and extending down its chest. The lion's muscular physique is evident, particularly in its hindquarters and shoulders. The foreground is dominated by various sizes of jagged, light brown rocks and patches of dry, straw-colored grass, intermingled with a few small, green, succulent-like plants. As one looks further into the midground, the landscape is dotted with several bare, gnarled trees or large shrubs with thin, leafless branches, along with tall, green cacti that resemble saguaros or columnar cacti. The background reveals a painted backdrop depicting undulating hills or mountains in muted purples and blues, set against a clear, light blue sky that suggests either dawn, dusk, or an artificial light source mimicking such conditions. The lighting in the scene appears to come from the upper right, casting soft shadows and highlighting the lion's fur, contributing to the realism of the diorama. The overall scene perfectly encapsulates a natural habitat for such a creature, meticulously crafted to immerse the viewer.

instruction: Turn this painting into a dramatic, real life photograph.

image_metadata.short_caption: A dramatic painting of a three-masted ship navigating through a vast, icy polar landscape flanked by towering icebergs under a muted sky, evoking a sense of majestic isolation and exploration.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image is a captivating painting, likely an oil on canvas, depicting a large, three-masted sailing ship navigating through a desolate and majestic polar landscape. In the foreground, vast expanses of pale, textured sea ice dominate the scene, interspersed with smaller chunks of ice and hints of dark, open water, suggesting either a frozen sea or a challenging passage through broken ice. The surface of the ice shows visible brushstrokes, creating a rough, almost granular texture. At the center, a formidable dark-hulled ship pushes through the ice, its tall, bare masts and intricate rigging reaching towards the muted sky. The ship's dark silhouette stands in stark contrast to the surrounding icy environment, and faint figures can be discerned on its deck, emphasizing the scale and human endeavor.

Flanking the ship are colossal ice formations that define the dramatic setting. To the left, a towering, jagged peak, either a snow-covered mountain or an immense iceberg, rises sharply, its surfaces displaying a complex interplay of light and shadow that accentuates its rugged contours and varying textures, from smooth snow drifts to exposed rock faces. On the right, an equally imposing, sheer ice cliff or tabular iceberg creates a formidable wall, reflecting the soft, diffused light of the sky.

The sky itself is a subdued, brownish-grey, suggesting either an overcast polar day, twilight, or dawn, contributing to the overall sense of quiet grandeur and isolation. The lighting is ethereal, casting soft glows on the ice and creating deep shadows. The visible texture of the paint, especially in the sky and on the ice, adds to the painting's expressive quality. The dominant colors are cool blues, greys, and whites for the ice, complemented by the dark tones of the ship and the warmer, muted hues of the sky and subtle reflections in the ice. The painting successfully conveys the formidable beauty, stark isolation, and immense scale of the Arctic or Antarctic wilderness, with the ship symbolizing human resilience and exploration against nature's might.

instruction: Fill the triangle with the ROYGBIV color gradient, remove the yellow sticky note and write "The Prism at the Gates of Dawn" in black Balloon font on the wall.

image_metadata.short_caption: A red painted vinyl record features a central blue triangle with horizontal stripes, displayed on a white wall with a sticky note titled "A Momentary Lapse Of Prism," a clever nod to Pink Floyd.
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a piece of wall art featuring a circular disc, likely a painted vinyl record, mounted against a plain white wall. The disc is predominantly a vibrant, glossy red. Superimposed centrally on this red background is a large, inverted isosceles triangle, outlined with a thick black border. The interior of the triangle is filled with a bright, light blue color, over which several darker blue horizontal stripes are evenly spaced. A small, circular, silver-colored metallic stud is positioned at the very center of the disc, resembling a record spindle. Faint circular grooves characteristic of a vinyl record are subtly visible through the paint, especially within the blue triangle, confirming its likely origin. Below the artwork, slightly to the right, a standard yellow sticky note is affixed to the wall. Handwritten in dark ink on the note are the words "A Momentary Lapse Of Prism." This clever title is a pun referencing Pink Floyd's album "A Momentary Lapse of Reason" and their iconic prism/triangle imagery from "The Dark Side of the Moon," tying the geometric design directly to its inspiration. The overall presentation is clean, geometric, and minimalist, with a clear pop culture homage.

instruction: Have both men looking up at the woman. She looks directly at the viewer while handing the small booklet in her left hand to the man sitting on the right, who has his right arm extended to take it.

image_metadata.short_caption: This image captures a museum exhibit featuring three wax figures—a woman, a man in a tweed suit, and a bearded man holding a pocket watch—within a historically decorated room with paisley wallpaper, a bookshelf, and a vintage phonograph labeled "Edison 1890" and "Gustave Eiffel."
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image presents an intricately staged indoor scene, likely a museum exhibit, featuring three lifelike wax figures arranged to evoke a specific historical period. In the foreground to the left, a man with light blonde hair is seated, his back mostly to the viewer, revealing a well-tailored grey tweed suit with a subtle pattern and a distinctive green cravat or bow tie. His left hand rests on a richly carved wooden desk, and his right leg is casually extended, showcasing a polished brown leather shoe. To the left and slightly behind him stands a woman with reddish-blonde hair and a composed expression, adorned in an elegant dark burgundy dress with black embroidered details, a high collar, and a black hat with dark feather plumes. She holds a light-colored book in her left hand. On the right side of the frame, an older man with a prominent white beard and matching white hair is seated against a dark wooden paneled door. He wears a formal black suit with a black waistcoat and a vibrant red and white polka-dotted cravat, and his gaze is directed downward as he holds a silver pocket watch in his left hand.

The room's decor reinforces the historical setting. The walls are covered in an ornate paisley-patterned wallpaper in muted shades of green, red, and beige. A tall bookshelf filled with numerous volumes is visible behind the woman on the left. The central wooden desk features a prominent early recording device, possibly a phonograph, with text visible on its base that reads "OFFERT A EIFFEL PAR EDISON 1890," along with two small wooden name plaques, one clearly stating "GUSTAVE EIFFEL." Beneath the desk, several glass scientific instruments or vessels are arranged on the floor. Above the desk, a framed black-and-white print of a large bridge spans a body of water, adding another layer of historical context. The overall ambiance is one of intellectual pursuit and historical significance, meticulously recreated through the detailed figures and period furnishings.

instruction: Make a photorealistic depiction of the mailbox, palette and flowers, as a real world scene. Stamp the expression written on the sticky note onto the side of the mailbox.

image_metadata.short_caption: A detailed vintage-style illustration of a US mailbox, an artist's palette, and a water tower is overlaid with a sticky note proclaiming, "THIS MUST BE THE PLACE."
image_metadata.detailed_caption: The image displays a flat lay composition featuring a textured background, likely a printed surface such as wallpaper or fabric, rendered in a muted purplish-gray hue. Adorning this background is an elaborate illustration drawn with dark gray or black lines, evoking the style of an antique engraving or etching. Prominently featured on the left side is a classic, rounded US mailbox, complete with the "US MAIL" inscription visible on its front, intricately detailed with a cross-hatch pattern. Below and to the right of the mailbox, a central artistic arrangement unfolds, comprising an artist's palette showing faint specks of paint, accompanied by several paintbrushes. This central element is encircled by a rich garland of botanical elements, including various leaves, blossoming flowers (some resembling roses), and diverse fruits such as pomegranates and bunches of grapes, alongside a glass bottle. The detailed line work provides a sense of depth and texture to all illustrated components. Towards the right side of the image, the top section of a water tower is visible, rendered in the same fine linework, with some faint, graffiti-like text, including the word "MONK," discernible on its structure. Superimposed over the upper right portion of this illustration is a light green or pale yellow sticky note, slightly curled at its top edge. Handwritten in neat, capital letters on the note are the words: "THIS MUST BE THE PLACE". The overall image combines elements of nostalgia, art, and a comforting declaration, suggesting a sense of belonging and creativity.

(or even the whole box)". The lighting creates reflections on the glossy plastic of the box and the shiny gold foil wrappers, adding a sense of depth and shimmer. image_metadata.short_caption: A weathered window with peeling shutters and a wrought iron grille is uniquely adorned by two teal-colored, fist-like sculptures peering out.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image provides a detailed, eye-level perspective of a weathered window on the facade of an old building, characterized by its distressed yet charming aesthetic. The central element is a multi-paned window, likely double-hung, framed in a faded off-white or cream, with its wooden components showing extensive peeling paint and signs of age. The window is secured by a prominent black metal grille, composed of robust vertical and horizontal bars forming a protective grid. Below this main grille, at the bottom section of the window, an intricate dark wrought iron balustrade adds an elegant, decorative touch, featuring elaborate scrollwork and a distinctive central motif that resembles a stylized sword or dagger.

Flanking the window are two louvered wooden shutters, also painted in a complementary aged white or cream. The paint on these shutters is heavily chipped, flaked, and cracked, revealing the darker material beneath and testifying to years of exposure to the elements. On the left shutter, a simple, rustic white metal latch or hook is visible. The building's exterior wall, visible around the window, appears to be constructed from light-colored stone or stucco, exhibiting subtle horizontal lines and additional weathering.

The most captivating and unexpected features of the scene are two large, sculpted objects positioned on the horizontal bar of the window grille, one on each side of the window's central division. These objects are a striking teal or verdigris green, with a textured, almost organic surface that suggests veins or cracks. They are distinctly shaped like massive, clenched fists or grotesque hands, seemingly emerging from within the building, lending a surreal and whimsical quality to the otherwise traditional architectural setting. The lighting is soft and even, highlighting the rich textures and the patina of age across all surfaces.

image_metadata.short_caption: Crepuscular rays pierce through a cloudy sky, illuminating a tranquil field path bordered by silhouetted trees at either sunrise or sunset.
image_metadata.detailed_caption:
The image presents a serene and atmospheric landscape under a sky dramatically lit by the sun, which is largely obscured by clouds. The upper half of the photograph is dominated by a vast expanse of sky, filled with various cloud formations ranging from textured, lumpy grey clouds to thinner, more ethereal wisps. At the center-top, the sun breaks through a gap in the clouds, appearing as a bright, diffused orb that casts striking crepuscular rays downwards and outwards. These "god rays" pierce through the cloud layers, creating visible shafts of light that illuminate the atmosphere and contrast beautifully with the darker, more dense cloud cover. The overall color palette of the sky is one of muted grays, soft whites, and pale yellows where the light penetrates.

Below the expressive sky, a dense line of dark, silhouetted trees stretches across the midground, forming a clear horizon line. Through and behind these trees, a lighter-colored building, possibly a house or a larger structure, is faintly visible, adding a subtle touch of human presence to the natural scene. A tall, slender pole, likely a flagpole, stands in front of this building. The lower portion of the image reveals an expansive, relatively flat field or meadow, rendered in deep shadow and muted tones of dark greens and browns. A winding, unpaved path, appearing to be dirt or gravel, meanders from the right foreground towards the center-left distance, inviting the viewer's eye to follow its gentle curve. On the far left, a small, dark body of water, possibly a pond or a marshy area, reflects the dim light. Sparse, indistinct figures, appearing to be people or perhaps animals, can be discerned along the path or in the field, adding a sense of scale and quiet activity. The low angle of the sun is evident through the long, soft shadows cast across the foreground, contributing to the overall tranquil and contemplative mood of the photograph.
